Abilities.title: Agile Fighter
Abilities.description: Your Strikes that have the Agile trait gain a +3 Universal Bonus instead.

feats.title: Flip (R)
feats.description: Strain 1. You make a flip, avoiding an attack. You use the Dodge reaction using your Combat Proficiency.

feats.title: Pirouette Strike (1)
feats.description: Strain 1. You Feint and make an Agile Strike. You may use Combat Proficiency for the Feint.=

feats.title: Sting Like A Bee (0)
feats.description: Strain 2. When you successfully Dodge a Melee Strike, you may immediatelymake an Agile Strike to the attacker.

Abilities.title: Backhand Parry
Abilities.description: Your fists have the Parry weapon trait. You can Raise a Fist like a weapon.

feats.title: Incredible Parry
feats.description: Strain 2. The Parry action with your fists costs (0). You Raise a Fist again.

feats.title: Unarmed Disarm (0)
feats.description: Strain 1. When you use Parry with your fists and cause the attack to become a Failure, you can use Break Stance on the opponent.

feats.title: Unarmed Riposte (0)
feats.description: Strain 1. When you use Parry with your fists and cause the attack to become a Failure, you can make an Unarmed Strike against the opponent.

Abilities.title: Berserk (1)
Abilities.description: You go berserk. You gain a +2 Status Bonus to Melee Strikes and Force actions,but cannot make Ranged Strikes, Focus, or use Skills except Force and Mobility. You stay in Berserk until you Snap Out (1).

feats.title: Iron Grip
feats.description: While in Berserk, two-handed weapons are one-handed weapons for you, and weapons with the Two-hand trait gain its benefits even when wielded with one hand.

feats.title: Lightning Bruiser
feats.description: While in Berserk, you gain a +2-meter Status Bonus to your Speed.

feats.title: Raging Thrower
feats.description: While in Berserk, you can use Ranged Strikes with Thrown weapons.All objects or characters your Size or smaller are Improvised weapons with the Thrown (4m) Trait .

Abilities.title: Blind Fighting
Abilities.description: You suffer only at most a -2 Penalty from sight-based effects during Conflicts, such as from Blinded or Darkness.

feats.title: Eyes in the Back
feats.description: You are not Off-Guard against characters in Stealth.=

feats.title: Fighting Instinct
feats.description: Reduce the maximum Penalty to 0.

feats.title: Honed Senses
feats.description: You apply the benefits from Blind Fighting outside of Conflicts.

Abilities.title: Block Expert
Abilities.description: Your Shield is Damaged only if the damage it takes is at least double the Shield’sBlock Value.

feats.title: Impose Shield (2)
feats.description: Strain 2. You Raise a Shield. You can Block (0) during this round and the next.

feats.title: Reflexive Block (R)
feats.description: Strain 1. You Block even if you are not Shielded.

feats.title: Shield Other
feats.description: You can use Block to protect an adjacent ally instead of yourself.

Abilities.title: Bravado
Abilities.description: You have an air of bravado about you during action. Whenever you cause a Conditionon an Opponent, you gain the Bravado 2 effect. While Bravado is active, you gain a +1 Status Bonus to Skill Checks and Attacks.

feats.title: Lasting Impression
feats.description: You gain Bravado 3 instead.

feats.title: Show Off (1)
feats.description: Strain 1. Use only when you have Bravado. You spend a moment to show off, such as to flaunt your body or do a flourish. Increase your Status Bonus to +3 for the next Skill Check or Attack.

feats.title: Swagger (1)
feats.description: Strain 1. Use only when you have Bravado. You Tumble once. You gain a +3 Status Bonus to your Defenses during the movement as you dance through opponents and hazards.

Abilities.title: Crimson Revel
Abilities.description: All of your Strikes deal Bleed Damage in addition to their normal types.

feats.title: Bloodcrazed
feats.description: Whenever you inflict the Bleeding condition on an opponent, you gain 5 Temporary Hit Points.

feats.title: Brutalize(1)
feats.description: You Kill aDefeated Character within your Melee Reach. Intimidate all characters that see you or are within 10 meters.You don’t take a penalty for the amount of characters intimidated, and you use Combat Proficiency for the Check.=

feats.title: Twist The Knife (1)
feats.description: If your previous action was a Melee Strike that dealt Pierce or Slash Damage, you afflict the target with Bleeding 2.

Abilities.title: Double Shot (1)
Abilities.description: Strain 2. You make two Ranged Strikes simultaneously or in rapid succession.

feats.title: Multishot(0)
feats.description: Strain +2. Increase the amount of Ranged Strikes you make by one. You can do this several times, up to five total Strikes.

feats.title: Stable Shot
feats.description: Strain +2.Your first two Strikes with

feats.title: Double Shot use the current Multiple Attack Penalty, and they count as one attack for further Multiple Attack Penalty.
Staggering Shots
feats.description: If the same target is hit by two Strikes from Double Shot, they become Stunned 2.

Abilities.title: Dual-Wielding (1)
Abilities.description: Strain 2. Make two Strikes with different weapons you're wielding in different hands.

feats.title: Strike Through (2)
feats.description: You Move and use Dual-Wielding. If you successfully deal Damage to an opponent, you can Move through the opponent’s space.

feats.title: Dual Parry (R)
feats.description: If you're wielding two weapons and at least one of themhas the Parry trait, you can use the Weapon Parry reaction without using the Raise a Weapon action.

feats.title: Twinned Strike
feats.description: When using two identical one-handed weapons for Dual-Wielding, you make both Strikes with Dual-Wielding with the current Multiple Attack Penalty. After the strikes, you increase the Multiple Attack Penalty twice.Identical weapons have the same base traits, but may have different modifications, like weapon mods or enchantments.

Abilities.title: Dueling (0)
Abilities.description: Strain 1. You excel at dueling against single targets. Choose a target. You gain a +1 Circumstance Bonus to your Strikes against the target.If you Attack or become Attacked by a characterother than the target, Dueling ends.You can target only one character at a time with Dueling.

feats.title: Dueling Riposte
feats.description: You can use Counter (R) on the target of Dueling even if your weapon is not Raised.

feats.title: Lunge (1)
feats.description: Strain 2. You Step, make a Melee Strike to the target of Dueling, and Step again.

feats.title: One-Handed Duelist
feats.description: If you use a weapon in one hand and your other hand is free, your Strikes with the weapon gain a +2 Status Bonus to their Damage.

Abilities.title: Fighting Spirit
Abilities.description: At the beginning of each Conflict, you gain 5 Temporary Hit Points (HP). They last until the end of the Conflict.

feats.title: Powerful Spirit
feats.description: Increase the Temporary HP gained to 10.

feats.title: Second Wind (1)
feats.description: You regain your Temporary Hit Points from Fighting Spirit, and also regain 5 Strain Points.You cannot use Second Wind again until you Refresh.

feats.title: Unyielding
feats.description: The first time you would be Defeated in each Conflict, you gain an Injury and stay at1 Hit Point instead.

Abilities.title: Fistfighting
Abilities.description: Your fists are Agile Weapons for Strikes and Abilities. Increase your Unarmed Attack Damage Dice to d6. You may Raise a Fist like a weapon.

feats.title: Flexible Strikes
feats.description: Your Unarmed strikes can deal any type of Physical Damage (Bleed, Blunt, Pierce,Slash).

feats.title: Follow-up Strike (0)
feats.description: After you make your first Strike in a turn, you can quickly make a follow-up Unarmed Strike.

feats.title: Powerful Fist
feats.description: Increase your Unarmed Attack’s Damage Dice to d8.

Abilities.title: Heavy Attack (2)
Abilities.description: Strain 2. You all of your strength into a single swing. Make a Melee Strike. Increase its Damage Dice and Potency by 1.This counts as two attacks when determining Multiple Attack Penalty.

feats.title: Knockdown
feats.description: When you Critically Succeed in a Heavy Attack,the target falls Prone.

feats.title: Momentum (0)
feats.description: Strain 1. You use your momentum from a Heavy Attack you just made to get back into position.It only counts as one attack for Multiple Attack Penalty.

feats.title: Sweep
feats.description: Strain +3.You make a large, sweeping attack. You target up to three Opponents adjacent to each other with Heavy Attack. Roll the Attack and Damage only once and applythem to each target.

Abilities.title: Hunt (1)
Abilities.description: You designate a target you can see or are Tracking as your Mark. While they're Marked, you gain a +2 Status Bonus to your Perception against the target.

feats.title: Flurry of Strikes
feats.description: Your Weapon attacks against your Mark gainthe Agile trait.

feats.title: Hunter's Edge
feats.description: When you make a Strike against your mark, you gain a Circumstance Bonus to your damage equal to your Combat Rank.

feats.title: Peerless Tracker
feats.description: When tracking your Mark, you automatically succeed on Tracking Checks.You must Track your Mark at least once successfully to gain this benefit.

Abilities.title: Jumping Attack (1)
Abilities.description: Strain 3. You Jump and make a Strike at any point during that Jump. You land within 1 meter of the target, or fall down to the current space on the ground if the target is midair and you make a Melee Strike.

feats.title: Advanced Technique
feats.description: You can instead use any Ability or Feat that makes at least one Strike during it with Jumping Attack, and thosewhich activate right after a Strike or Jump is made. Use the Action cost that is higher.

feats.title: Air Combo(1)
feats.description: Strain 3. You make an additional Strike during the jump. You may do this multiple times during a Jumping Attack.

feats.title: Plunging Attack
feats.description: If you use Jumping Attack to make a

feats.title: Melee Strike on a target below you, you gain a +2 Universal Bonus to the Damage of the Strike for every 2 meters you fall.
feats.description: Use the d20 roll for the Strike to also make a Landing Check. You land next to the opponent or on top of them.

Abilities.title: Protect (1)
Abilities.description: You designate a character or object to protect. As longas you're within 1 meter of the target, the target has Cover (p. 37), and they cannot be Killed or Knocked Out.You can Protect only one target at a time, and you cannot be Protected while using Protect.

feats.title: Body Block (R)
feats.description: If the Protected character would take damage, you can interject the Attack or Effect and take that damage in their stead. If the damage would apply to both of you, they gain a +5 Circumstance Bonus to the

feats.title: Protector's Carry (1)
feats.description: You grab a Defeated character into a carry with a FreeHand. The character is now your Protected target.

feats.title: Protector's Presence
feats.description: When you Protect someone, they gain 5 Temporary Hit Points as long as they’re protected. They become immune to this effect until the end of the scene.

Abilities.title: Quickshot (1)
Abilities.description: You Draw a weapon you have Equipped or inyour Pockets and make a Ranged Strike.

feats.title: Fan the Hammer (1)
feats.description: Strain 2. You use Autofire with a weapon that has a Magazine but doesn’t have the Rapid trait. Can be used with Quickshot.

feats.title: Fastest Draw in…
feats.description: Strain +2.When you use Quickshot, your targetis Off-Guard to it. You can Stow the weapon immediately afterthe Strike.

feats.title: Speedy Reload (R)
feats.description: Use an Interact action to Reload a weapon after making a Strike with it.

Abilities.title: Ranged Parry
Abilities.description: You can use Weapon Parry (R) and Shield Parry (R) against Ranged Strikes.

feats.title: Deflection (0)
feats.description: Strain 1. You can deflect a Ranged Strike back to the sender. When you Parry a Ranged Strike and don’t take damage from it, make a Daunting (20) Check. On a success, you can make a Ranged Strike (0) on the opponent using their weapon’s statistics.

feats.title: Improvised Parry
feats.description: You can use any Improvised weapon to Parry (R) Ranged Strikes .

feats.title: Untouchable (0)
feats.description: Strain 1. You use Weapon Parry or Shield Parry. You Raise that Weapon or Shield again.

Abilities.title: Reactive Strike (R)
Abilities.description: Strain 2. You make a Melee Strike against a character that Moves within your melee range. Moving into your range and Forced Movement do not trigger this reaction.

feats.title: Overwatch(1)
feats.description: You watch over an area, ready to Strike anyone who Moves within or enters the area. Seek an area you can see. You canuse a Ranged Strike as a Reactive Strike towards a character that Moves in the area.

feats.title: Reflexive Strike
feats.description: Strain +1.Your Reactive Strike is not affected by your Multiple Attack Penalty if it happens outside of your turn.

feats.title: Surprising Strike
feats.description: Strain +2.You strike instantly, so fast that the opponent is unable to notice it. The Reactive Strike cannot be reactedto.

Abilities.title: Snipe (1)
Abilities.description: Strain 2, Focus. Choose a target when youFocus. YouAim and make a Ranged Strike at the target. Double the Range Increments of the weapon this Strike.

feats.title: Deadshot
feats.description: Strain +2. When using Snipe, increase the Strike’s Damage Dice and Potency by 1.

feats.title: Incredible Aim
feats.describtion: Strain +2.You gain a +2 Circumstance Bonus to the Ranged Strike.

feats.title: Patient Sniper (E)
feats.description: You patiently wait for your target and study their movements. You gain a +2 Status Bonus to the Ranged Strike.

Abilities.title: Stance (0)
Abilities.description: Focus. Youenter a stance for martial arts. Your Melee Strikes (Weapon and Unarmed) all gain a specific weapon trait. You cannot gain the same trait to a Strike that already has it.When you take this ability, name it [BLANK} Stance, and choose a weapon trait from the following: Breach, Fatal d8, Forceful, Parry, Sweep.The benefits of the Stance remain as long as you maintain Focus.

feats.title: Additional Stance
feats.description: You gain an additional Stance. Follow the same rules as your original Stance. You can only Focus on one stance at a time.You can take this feat multiple times, gaining more Stances.

feats.title: Advanced Martial Arts
feats.description: You learn more advanced martial arts stances. Each of your Stances gains an additional trait, either from the original list or from these options: Agile, Blast, Massive.

feats.title: Peerless Focus
feats.description: Your Focuson a Stance does not break when you take damage.

Abilities.title: Standoff (R)
Abilities.description: Strain 1, Focus. Choose a target when you Focus. When the target would Attack you, you may immediately make a Strike against them as a Reaction, and you gain a +2 Circumstance Bonus to the Strike, which resolves before the target’s Attack.

feats.title: Dramatic Stow (0)
feats.description: Strain +2. Immediately after making a Strike during Standoff, you may Stow your weapon dramatically. Increase the Damage Dice and Potency of the Strike by 1.Forced Focus (1)You Focus on Standoff and regain your Reaction.

feats.title: Instant Strike
feats.description: You may use Standoff with a weapon that is Equippedbut is not in your hand.

Abilities.title: Stunning Strike (1)
Abilities.description: Strain 2. Make a Melee Strike. You do not gain Bonus Damage from the Melee Strike action. It gains the following effects:◆ Success: The character is Stunned 2 ◇ Critical: The character is Stunned 3

feats.title: Pressure Points
feats.description: Strain +2.The target also loses the ability to use a limb for the duration of Stunned. Choose one:◆ Arm: They cannot use the chosen arm for the duration of Stunned.◆ Leg: Their Speed is lowered by -2 meters for the duration of Stunned.

feats.title: Ranged Stun
feats.description: You can use Stunning Strike with Ranged Strikes.

feats.title: Slowing Strike
feats.description: Strain +2.The target of Stunning Strike alsogains an equal value of Slowed.

Abilities.title: Takedown (1)
Abilities.description: Strain 2. You attack an opponent from Stealth. Make a one-handed Melee Strike with a Benefit. It gains the following effects: ◆ Success: Increase the Strike's damage dice and Potency by1.◇ Critical: If the target is a Mook, they are immediately Knocked Out or Killed.◆ Critical Failure: You are noticed by the target.

feats.title: Hide The Evidence
feats.description: Immediately after making the Strike, you can Reposition the target.

feats.title: Ranged Takedown
feats.description: Strain +1.You can use Takedown at range. If you're within the first Range Increment, you can use Takedown with a Ranged Strike.

feats.title: Silent Strike
feats.description: Strain +1. Takedown is silent. If the target is Defeated, Knocked Out, or Killed, you don't trigger a Seek reaction from nearby characters.

Abilities.title: Taunt (1)
Abilities.description: Strain 1. You goad a character within 5 meters to attack you. The target has a -2 Status Penalty to Attacks against anyone but you. This Penalty lasts until they Attack you.

feats.title: Come At Me! (2)
feats.description: Strain +1. You taunt all characters within Range.

feats.title: Powerful Presence
feats.description: Increase the Status Penalty to -3.

feats.title: You Over There!
feats.description: Strain +1. Increase the range of Taunt to 10 meters.

Abilities.title: Trickshot(1)
Abilities.description: Strain 2. You make an incredibly difficult shot through a precise ricochet or similar trick. Make a Ranged Strike. It ignores any Item or Circumstance bonuses the target has to their Defenses. It gains the following possible outcome:◆ Critical Failure: You accidentally ricochet the shot to an ally within 3 meters of you or yourself if no ally is within range.

feats.title: Chained Shot
feats.description: Strain +2.Your trickshot ricochets additional times, hitting a second target of your choice within 3 meters of the first. Make a second Trickshot against that character.

feats.title: Collateral
feats.description: When using Trickshot, you can make a Break Check instead of hitting a character.This uses your Combat Proficiency.

feats.title: Midair Shot
feats.description: Strain +2. You can use Trickshot at any point during a Jump.

Abilities.title: Weapon Discipline
Abilities.description: You are trained in the use of weapons. You gain a Discipline token. If you would drop the item, you can spend your Discipline token instead. You regain your Discipline token when you Drill (E) your weapon skills.You also can use Weapons and Apparel with the Advanced trait without incurring any penalties, even if you do not have the required proficiency in Combat.

feats.title: Maintenance
feats.description: Your equipment is well-kept and hardy. Whenever a weapon, armor, or shield you have would Break, you can instead spend your Discipline token.

feats.title: Weapon Specialization
feats.description: Strain 1. You gain a +2 Circumstance Bonus to a Damage Roll with a weapon.

feats.title: Weapon Trick (H)
feats.description: You practice a trick with a weapon in your possession. The weapon gains a new trait when you use it: Blast, Break, Forceful, Grapple, Parry, Reposition, Sweep, Trip, Two-hand.Each weapon can only gain one trait from Weapon Trick. The weapon must be eligible for the trait you choose.

Abilities.title: Weapon Improvisation
Abilities.description: You do not gain the -2 Universal Penalty when using improvised weapons.

feats.title: Crunch (0)
feats.description: Strain 2. When you make a Strike with an Improvised weapon, you can increase its Damage Die Type by 1 tier. If you do, the weapon breaks.

feats.title: Off-hand Strike (1)
feats.description: In a single motion, you Interact with an Improvised weapon and make a Strike with it. The target is Off-Guard towardit.The target then becomes Immune to the Off-Guard effect of this Feat.

feats.title: Weapon Thrower
feats.description: All improvised weapons gain the Thrown (2m) Trait when you handle them.

Abilities.title: Bullet Time (0)
Abilities.description: Focus. Strain 3. As long as you Focus and spendthe Strain each turn, you are Quickened. Additionally, you gaina +4meter Status Bonus to your Speed, a +4 Status Bonus to your Toughness and Perception.

feats.title: Bullet Dodge (0)
feats.description: Strain 1. You use the Dodge action whileFocusing on Bullet Time. You gain a +2 Universal Bonus to your Toughness and Perception for the duration of the Dodge.

feats.title: Faster than the Eye (1)
feats.description: Strain 4. While Focusing on Bullet Time, You make up to 4 Strikes against characters within 3 meters of you, or within a ranged weapon’s first range increment. Use your current Multiple Attack Penalty for them.

feats.title: Sweating Bullets
feats.description: Reduce the Strain cost of Bullet Time to 2.

Abilities.title: Extreme Bionics
Abilities.description: An installed Bionic you have is extreme and grotesque in size. Choose a bionic and double the bonuses it provides.

feats.title: Ghost in the Machine
feats.description: Your body is just a biological or mechanical vessel foran artificial self stored somewhere in your head. If you die, this artificial self can be collected and put to another body.

feats.title: Intravenous Drugs
feats.description: You have installed a constant supply of a drug to be injected to your body. You gain 3 Temporary Hit Points at the beginning of each Round.

feats.title: Multiple Arms
feats.description: You can have and control two additional arms if they are installed on your body.

Abilities.title: Integrated Weapon
Abilities.description: You have a weapon grafted to your body. Choose Hidden or Overt. This weapon is always Equipped, and takes one Equipment Slot.◆ Hidden: The weapon must be Deployed (1) like a Draw action, as your body morphs to reveal the weapon. It can still be detected on scans, but is hidden visually.◆ Overt: You cannot hide the weapon, and it usually always occupies one of your hands. Regardless of size, this weapon is always one-handed for you. You gain a +1 Item Bonus to using the weapon.

feats.title: Instant Reveal (0)
feats.description: Strain 1. You can Deploy a; Hidden Integrated Weapon immediately.

feats.title: Mastered Arms
feats.description: Increase your Item Bonus for Integrated Weapons by +1.

feats.title: Multiple Weapons
feats.description: You can integrate multiple weapons into your body, but each takes an Equipment slot.Choose Hidden or Overt for each of them.

Abilities.title: Smite
Abilities.description: Strain 1. You exclaim your faith and make a Melee Strike. The Strike deals either Dark or Holy Damage in addition to its normal types.

feats.title: Blade of Incandescence
feats.description: Strain +2. Your weapon temporarily gainsn Range Increment of 5 meters, as your weapon shoots a beam of channeled energy.

feats.title: Ranged Smite
feats.description: You smite your foes from afar. You can make a Ranged Strike as part of Smite.

feats.title: Retributive Smite (R)
feats.description: You Smite a target that dealt Damage to an ally and is either in your Melee Range or in your weapon’s first Range Increment.

Abilities.title: Bonded weapon
Abilities.description: You tie a weapon to yourself magically, allowing you to Call (0) it to your hand. It teleports instantly to your hand as long as it is within 1 kilometer of you.

feats.title: Far Strikes
feats.description: Focus, Strain 2. As long as you Focus on this Ability, you can make Melee Strikes with a Bonded Weapon at a range of 5 meters. This includes any Abilities that require the use of Melee Strikes. You may use your Special Proficiency for these Strikes.

feats.title: Magic Reload (0)
feats.description: Strain 1. The weapon spends an action to Reload itself.

feats.title: Twinned Weapons
feats.description: You gain a second Bonded Weapon.

Abilities.title: Elemental Infusion
Abilities.description: You align yourself with a magical element. When you take this Ability, choose Cold, Electricity or Fire.Your Strikes may deal Damage of the chosen type in addition of its normal types.

feats.title: Elemental Blast (1)
feats.description: Strain 1. You make an elemental blast of your chosen damage type. It is a Ranged Strike with 5m Range Increment which deals d8 Damage.

feats.title: Elemental Deflection (R)
feats.description: When you would take damage, you increase your Resistance to Cold, Electricity and Fire Damage by your Proficiency Rank for one instance of Damage.

feats.title: Twin Elements
feats.description: Choose a second element. You can Switch (1) your elemental alignment.

Abilities.title: Wind Strike
Abilities.description: Strain 1. You focus wind from the tip of your weapon, sending out a Strike at range in the shape of an arc or beam. Make a Strike.◆ Melee Strike: The Strike gains a Range Increment of 5 meters like a Ranged Strike.◆ Ranged Strike: The Strike’s Range Increments are doubled.

feats.title: Dual Strike (2)
feats.description: Strain 3. You make two Wind Strike Attacks in succession towards the same target. They both use your current Multiple Attack Penalty.

feats.title: Piercing Wind
feats.description: Strain +2. The Strike hits all characters in a line equal in length to its first Range Increment. The Strike then disperses.

feats.title: Wind Arc (2)
feats.description: Strain 3. You make a wide, horizontal attack. The Wind Strike targets up to three adjacent characters. If used with Piercing Wind, the Strike is 3 meters wide.

Abilities.title: Natural Weapon
Abilities.description: You have sharp claws or a similar natural weapon. When using this natural weapon, your Unarmed attacks deal d8 Damage but lose the Agile trait. It deals Blunt, Piercing or Slash damage, which you choose when you take this Ability. You can take this Ability again for a different Natural weapon. Your Natural Weapons count as Weapons for the use of any abilities, actions, or feats.

feats.title: Advanced Weapon
feats.description: The natural weapon gains one of the following Weapon Traits: Breach, Grapple, Fatal, Sweep, Trip.

feats.title: Extending Appendage
feats.description: Your natural weapon can extend, such as a tail or tongue. The natural weapon has a 3 meter Melee Range.

feats.title: Toxicity
feats.description: Choose Acid or Toxic Damage. Your Natural Weapon deals that damage type in addition to its basic damage type.

Abilities.title: Bless (1)
Abilities.description: Focus. Strain 3. You give a blessing of a Deity to up to 5 allies within 5 meters. They gainthe Deity’s Blessing effect for 3 Rounds.

feats.title: Aegis
feats.description: Strain +1. When you Bless a character, they also gain a Status Bonus to Resistance toward all Damage types for the duration. The Bonus is equal to your Special Rank (+1 to +5).

feats.title: Bless Weapon (E)
feats.description: Strain 3. You bless a weapon. It deals Holy or Dark damage in addition to its normal damage types for 1 Horizon Round.

feats.title: Divine Healing (1)
feats.description: Strain 2. A target in your unarmed reach regains d6 Hit Points.

Abilities.title: Channel Divinity (1)
Abilities.description: Strain 2. You channel divine power. Make a Ranged Strike. The damage type depends on the nature of your power (chosen when you take the ability).Range: 50-foot incrementDamage: d6 Dark / Holy

feats.title: Blinding Channel
feats.description: Your channeled beam blinds opponents with light or darkness. On Success or greater, the target is also Blinded 2.

feats.title: Far Channel
feats.description: Strain +2. Increases the range increment of Channel Divinity to 100 feet.

feats.title: Far Grasp
feats.description: Strain +2.On a success or greater, Channel Divinity also Repositions the target.

Abilities.title: Exorcism (E)
Abilities.description: Strain 4. You exorcise a spirit or ghost possessing a character, object or something else. Make a Standard (10) Check VS Resolve.◆ Success: You drive the spirit away.◇ Critical: You destroy or purify the spirit, sending it forcefully to the afterlife.◆ Failure: Nothing happens.◇ Critical: You hurt the possessed character. They take 1d6P1 Psychic Damage.If you wish to destroy or purify a spirit, you can turna Success into a Failure on purpose.

feats.title: Awaken (3)
feats.description: You awaken a sealed spirit.

feats.title: Holy Tools
feats.description: You have various holy tools in your kit. You gain a +2 Item Bonus to the Exorcism Check if you use a Kit Charge.

feats.title: Seal
feats.description: Instead of exorcising the spirit, you seal it. If you choose to seal the spirit, you gain a Benefit to your Check to Exorcise, and on a Success, the spirit falls into a deep slumber.Items with sealed spirits often have powerful effects, such as curses or benefits.Sealed spirits cannot be Exorcised as long asthey slumber.

Abilities.title: Aether Magic
Abilities.description: Aether magic creates and manipulates aether, the fundamental magic component.◆ Attack (1), Focus, Strain 1. Aether damage.◆ Environment (3), Focus, Strain 5.Create an invisible wall in the area. Breaking the wall is a Daunting (20) Check. The wall lasts for 10 Rounds.◆ Summon (1), Focus, Strain 2. You create a weapon made of shimmering, astral material. It takes the form and traits of a weapon you’ve handled previously, except it has no weight. It cannot replicate enchantments or magic effects.

feats.title: Aether Armament
feats.description: When you use a Summon spell, you can instead summon apparel or a shield for the duration. You may also spend +1 Strain to summonan additional item.

feats.title: Aether Bubble
feats.description: When you cast an Environment spell, you may instead target a single Character. You create an invisible bubble around them that lasts for the Duration. The target inside the bubble is impervious to all damage from outside sources unless the bubble is Broken. The difficulty to Break it is Daunting (20).

feats.title: Force Barrage
feats.description: When you cast an Attack spell, you may lower the Damage Die size by 1 (down to d4) to casttwo additional Attack spells with the same traits.Roll each attack separately. Use the Current Multiple Attack Penalty for all of them.

Abilities.title: Alteration Magic
Abilities.description: Alteration magic changes the properties of characters and objects.◆ Attack (1), Focus, Strain 4. True Damage. If it causes an Injury, it is automatically a Grievous Injury . Can be used to Break objects.◆ Character (1), Focus, Strain 2. You grant a target Resistance to all damage equal to your Special Rank (+1 to +5).This effect lasts for 3 Rounds.◆ Environment (1), Focus, Strain 2. You alter the ground. You make normal terrain to Slowing terrain, or Slowing terrain into normal terrain. This effect lasts for 3 rounds.◆ Object (1), Focus, Strain 2. Youmake a target object or structure stronger or more brittle. The Checks to Break orSunder it have your choice of Benefit or Detriment. This effect lasts for 3 rounds.

feats.title: Buoyancy
feats.description: When casting an Object spell, you may instead alter its buoyancy. You may also target a character with buoyancy. The target will either sink or float on top of water, allowing you to create platforms or walk on water.

feats.title: +2 Strain.The alteration spell you use lasts until you Rest.
Turn to Stone
feats.description: Strain +5. When you cast a Character spell, you may cast it with (2) instead, VS Perception. When you do, the targeted becomes Petrifying 3. Each time Petrifying counts down, the target’s Speed is lowered by 2 meters, andonce Petrifying hits 0, the character turns to stone.

Abilities.title: Barrier Magic
Abilities.description: You can create barriers that protect you and your allies from harm. Barriers created with the magic can be broken with a Standard (10) Check against the caster’s Special Proficiency .◆ Character (R), Strain 3. You quickly create a barrier around a character. The barrier grants them Resistance 5 to every damage typewhich is applied before the character’s normal resistances. This effect lasts for 1 Round. If Area of Effect is used, the barrier is larger, enveloping all characters in the area in a large bubble. Characters inside and outside the bubble have Resistance to Attacks that cross the bubble.◆ Environment (1), Focus, Strain 3.You create a flat barrier in the area. It is impassable and provides Cover. The effect lasts for 3 Rounds.◆ Object (1), Focus, Strain 2. You create a barrier surrounding an object. The object cannot be touched beforethe barrier is broken. This effect lasts for 3 rounds. May also be used on portals like doors and doorways.

feats.title: Instant Barrier
feats.description: You can use the Character spell on yourself with (0) instead of (R).

feats.title: Selective Barriers
feats.description: When you use the Character spell with an Area of Effect, you create individual barriers around only your chosen allies instead.

feats.title: Supercharge Barrier (0)
feats.description: When a character protected by a Barrier would take damage, you may instead supercharge it and take all the damage exceeding the Barrier’s Armor as Psychic Damage.

Abilities.title: Blood Magic
Abilities.description: You control blood, both yours and others. Unlike other magic, Blood Magic uses HP instead of SP to cast and use Abilities. Any additional traits also use HP instead of SP.Blood Magic ignores Temporary HP, and gives you Immunityto healing until you Refresh.◆ Attack (1), Focus, HP 1. Bleed damage.◆ Environment (1), Focus, HP 3. You create a red, sanguine mist. It is a Gas that deals d6 Bleed Damageto any characters in the area at the end of their turn. The effect lasts for 3 Rounds. ◆ Character (1), Focus, HP 2, VS Toughness. You control the blood in the character’s body. You can Command (R) the character to make a single action each turn as long as you Focus on this spell.◆ Summon (1), Focus, HP 2. You summon a Melee Weapon made ofblood to your hand.; It deals Bleed Damage in addition to other types.

feats.title: Blood Price
feats.description: You may use HP instead of SP to cast any spell from any other Magic Ability. You cannot use Blood Price to cast spellsthat Heal.

feats.title: Corpse Magic (1)
feats.description: You Kill aDefeated Character within 5 meters. If your next action is to cast a Blood Magic spell, you can substitute up to 5 HP from thecost of the spell with the blood of the character you just Killed.

feats.title: HP +2. When you cast an Attack Spell, you alsogain Hit Points equal to the highest Damage Die rolled.
feats.description: This ignores the healing Immunity.

Abilities.title: Death Magic
Abilities.description: Death magic allows you to manipulate the forces of death and decay.◆ Attack (1), Focus, Strain 1. Dark Damage.◆ Character (1), Focus, Strain 3. Make a Check VS Resolve targeting an Undead character. On a Success, you can Command it immediately and once per turn, and it spends 1 Action to do your bidding. This effect lasts for 3 rounds.◆ Object (1), Focus, Strain 3. Youimbue a weapon with a killing curse. It deals Dark Damage in addition to other types, and if a character is Defeated with it, the character dies instantly. The effect lasts for 10 Rounds.◆ Summon (2), Focus, Strain 3. Youturn a corpse into a Zombie Mook you can Command. It’s a Strong Mookthat has 3-meter Speed and uses the weapons and attacks of the original character.

feats.title: Bind the Dead
feats.description: Strain +2. When you use a Character Spell, the character instead becomes your minion on a Success, which you have complete command over. It will not act unless youCommand it.

feats.title: Eviscerate
feats.description: Strain +3. When you use an Attack spell, it additionally deals True Damage. Increase the Damage Die size by 1.

feats.title: Skeletal Escape
feats.description: When you use a Summon spell, you may instead turn a corpse into a Skeleton mook. It is a Fast Mook that uses the weapons and attacks of the original character.

Abilities.title: Divination Magic
Abilities.description: Divination magic allows the character to observe things across both distance and time.◆ Character (1), Focus, Strain 2. You observe the future actions of the target character. You can use Predict (R) once for the durationof the current scene, where the target gains a Benefit or Detriment to a roll they make.◆ Environment (E), Strain 5. You observe a location from afar. You must know the location you’re connected to,or it must include a character you know. This spell has an infinite range. This vision lasts until the end of the

feats.title: Exploration Action.
feats.description: ◆ Object (E), Strain 3. You observe the past and future of an object. You can immediately make a Recall Knowledge Check about the Object. You can use your Special Proficiency for the roll. On a Success, you may ask anything about the history or nature of the object.

feats.title: Protection from Divination
feats.description: You have set countermeasures against scrying. You can do a Protection Ritual (E) to make a character untargetable to Divination magic. The target’s self is distorted in any Divination spell that would observe them.This effect lasts for the Horizon Round.

feats.title: Spying Eye
feats.description: When using an Environment Spell, you may instead cast it with (3). When you do, its maximum range is 1 kilometer, and it lasts for up to 10 rounds. You create a small, invisible eye, which has a Fly Speed of 5m.

feats.title: True Strike
feats.description: When you use Predict (R) on a Strike, the Strike may also deal True Damage.

Abilities.title: Earth Magic
Abilities.description: Earth magic manipulates the soil and rock.◆ Attack (1), Focus, Strain 1. Blunt or Pierce damage, Breach.◆ Environment (1), Focus, Strain 3. You raise or lower the ground by up to 2 meters (does not cause damage). You may choose an effect for each square you target (such as creating pillars, a ditch, or a wall). The effect lasts indefinitely.◆ Character (1), Focus, Strain 1. You move a character by moving the earth beneath their feet. Make a Reposition Check VS Perception.◆ Summon (2), Focus, Strain 3. You summon an earth elemental and Command it. It’s a Strong Mook with Tough, and Resistance 5 to all damage.

feats.title: Big Rock
feats.description: Strain +3. When you use an Attack spell, increase the Damage Die Size by 1 and it gains the following effects:◆ Success: The target is moved 1 meter into a free space, and a large boulder takes its place. If no space within 1 meter is free, the target suffers the Critical Success effect.◇ Critical: The target is Prone and Restrained under the rock. Moving it is a Daunting (20) Force Check.

feats.title: Bridge
feats.description: When using an Environment spell, you may instead cast it with (3). If you do, you may create a bridge up to 20 meters long and 3 meters wide. It can take the form of stairs.

feats.title: Large Elemental
feats.description: Strain +2. When you use a Summon spell, the elemental is Large-sized and its unarmed attacks deal d10 Damage.

Abilities.title: Essence Magic
Abilities.description: Essence magic is about manipulating pure magic energy.◆ Attack (R), Strain 4, Attack VS Special. You push an Attack Spell back to its caster by copying it. On a Success , the spell is reflected, targeting the caster.◆ Character (1), Focus, Strain 4. You dispel a magical effect from the character. Make a Daunting (20) roll. On a Success, the effect is dispelled.◆ Environment (1), Focus, Strain 1. You detect magical effects in the area, and traces of past magical activity. You canimmediately make a Recall Knowledge

feats.title: Check about any active or past effects with a Benefit using Special.
feats.description: ◆ Object (2), Focus, Strain 6. You dispel a magical effect from an object or structure. Make a Daunting (20) roll. On a Success, the effect is dispelled for 3 rounds. On a Critical Success,it is dispelled permanently.

feats.title: Counterspell
feats.description: You may use Attack Spell to counter any spell as it is being cast. Instead of turning it back on its caster, it fizzles out to nothing.

feats.title: Remove Essence
feats.description: When casting an Environmental spell, you can instead cast it with (E). When you do so, you clean the area of magical traces, but the tampering is obvious.

feats.title: Trace the Path
feats.description: When you use an Environmental spell, the traces revealed by the magic also follow the path of the source for a while. You can Track the source with a Benefit, using your Special Proficiency.

Abilities.title: Fire Magic
Abilities.description: Fire magic creates and manipulates fire. Fire effects can act as light sources (5 meters).◆ Attack (1), Focus, Strain 1. Fire Damage, Blast.◆ Environment (1), Focus, Strain 3. Set the area in flames. It becomes Hazardous Terrain. The fire may spread to other flammable material nearby.◆ Object (1), Focus, Strain 2. Youheat a metal object red-hot. Anyone touching it takes d6 Fire Damage when you castthe spell and at the beginning of each turn they keep touching it. They can Release (0) it after taking the damage once if it is in their hand.◆ Summon (2), Focus, Strain 3. Summon a Fire Elemental and Command it.It is a Special Mook aligned with Fire damage, with immunity to Fire Damage.

feats.title: Blue Flame
feats.description: Strain +1. Your flames turn extra hot. Increase the damage die size of your Fire Spells, Hazards, and Summons by 1.

feats.title: Flame-Repellent
feats.description: You gain Resistance to Fire Damage equal to your Special Path Rank. You are immuneto your own Fire Spells.

feats.title: Immolate
feats.description: Strain +2.When you cast an Attack spell, the target starts Burning on a Success.

Abilities.title: Gravity Magic
Abilities.description: Gravity Magic manipulates physical objects and characters via the use of gravity.◆ Attack (1), Focus, Strain 1. Blunt damage. The target is moved up to 1 meter on a Success.◆ Character (1), Focus, Strain 2, VS Toughness. You levitate a medium-size or smaller character up to 5 meters to any direction. The effect lasts as long as you Focus on the spell, and you repeat the effect on the character whenever you Focus.◆ Environment (1), Focus, Strain 2. You increase or lower the gravity in the area. The area gains either High or Low Gravity.◆ Object (1), Focus, Strain 1. You levitate a target Heavy or lighter object 5 meters to any direction. The effect lasts as long as you Focus on the spell. When you Focus on the spell on subsequent turns, you can move the target another 5 meters into any direction.

feats.title: Fly
feats.description: When you cast a Character Spell, you can instead cast it with (0) on yourself. You gain Fly Speed of 5 meters for 3 Rounds.

feats.title: Massive Power
feats.description: You can spend +1 Strain to increase the maximum size of the objects or characters you can target with a Character or Object spell by one.

feats.title: Zero-G
feats.description: Strain +1. When casting an Environmental spell, you may instead change the gravity in the area into Zero-G.

Abilities.title: Ice Magic
Abilities.description: Ice magic creates and manipulates ice and frost.◆ Attack (1), Focus, Strain 1. Cold damage, Blast.◆ Character (1), Focus, Strain 2, VSPerception. On a Success, the target is Immobilized 2 and Restrained for the duration as they’re encased in ice. The ice can be Broken with a Difficult (15) Break Action or Fire damage.◆ Environment (1), Focus, Strain 2. The area becomes Slippery Terrain.The effect lasts for 3 rounds.◆ Object (1), Focus, Strain 1. Encase the object in ice, making it impossible to move or operate unless the ice is Broken with a Difficult (15) Check or dealing Fire damage to it.

feats.title: Bone Chill
feats.description: Strain +2. When successfully casting an Attackor Character spell, the target is Chilled 2. While Chilled, they have a -2meter Status Penalty to their Speed.

feats.title: Frost Trail
feats.description: While you’re Focusing on Ice magic, you gain a +2-meter Status Bonus to your Speed and create a trail of Slippery Terrain when you Move. The terrain lasts for 3 rounds.You are not affected by Slippery Terrain as long as you Focus on Ice Magic.

feats.title: Tough Ice
feats.description: When you cast an ice spell that creates ice, the difficulty of Breaking it is increased toDaunting (20).

Abilities.title: Illusion Magic
Abilities.description: Illusion magic creates tricks of the light and mind.If a character Interacts with an illusion, they can Disbelieve it with a Difficult (15) Perception Check.◆ Character (1), Focus, Strain 1. You Intimidate the target.◆ Environment (2), Focus, Strain 2. You create illusory elements to the environment, such as holes, statues, or a wall. The effect lasts for 10 turns.◆ Object (1), Focus, Strain 1. You glamer a Large or smaller Item to look like something else. The effect lasts for an  Exploration Round. ◆ Summon (2), Focus, Strain 4. You summon an illusory character of Medium or smaller Size. And Command it. You can increase illusion’s size by one by spending +1 SP.

feats.title: Disguise
feats.description: When casting a character spell, you can instead cast it with (2) to Disguise the target to look like someone else.

feats.title: Invisibility
feats.description: Strain +2.When casting a character spell, you may instead make the targeted character Invisible for 10 rounds.

feats.title: Real Illusion
feats.description: Strain +2.When you cast an Illusion spell, the illusion is so lifelike that characters take damage as if the illusion were real, but taking Psychic Damage. The illusion is affected Resistances and Weaknesses like the real thing. Disbelieving it is a Daunting (20) Perception Check, after which it can no longer do damage to them.

Abilities.title: Life Magic
Abilities.description: Life magic is used for healing and rejuvenation.◆ Attack (1), Focus, Strain 1. Holy Damage to an Undead target.◆ Character (1), Focus, Strain 3. Heal target character for d8 Hit Points.◆ Environment (E), Strain 5. You create a healing spring. Characters inside the healing spring heal 3 Hit Points per Round. The effect lasts until you Refresh or Rest.

feats.title: Destroy Undead
feats.description: When you cast a character spell, if you target an Undead character, you can force them to take damage equal to the amount you would normally heal them.

feats.title: Recovery Magic
feats.description: Strain +2. When you cast a Character spell, you may, instead of Healing, use it to remove one Temporary Condition or a Persistent Condition that requires Recovery Check to remove.If the Condition has effects that happen when it is removed or it Counts Down, those effects do not trigger.

feats.title: Sacrifice
feats.description: When you cast a Character Spell, you may spend 1 HP to increase the amount you heal by 1, after the die roll is made. You may do this as many times as you like per casting, down to 0 Hit Points. You cannot benefit from the healing spell yourself when you use it this way.

Abilities.title: Lightning Magic
Abilities.description: Lightning magic surges electricity in different forms.◆ Attack (1), Focus, Strain 1. Electricity damage, Stun.◆ Character (1), Focus, Strain 1. Target gains +2-meter Status Bonus totheir Speed. This effect lasts for 3 Rounds.◆ Object (1), Focus, Strain 1. You magnetize a metallic object. While within 1 meter of the object, Characters have a +2 Status Bonus to their Defenses against Strikes from metallic weapons =and effects. This effect lasts for 3 Rounds. ◆ Summon (2), Focus, Strain 4.Summon a Storm Elemental and Command it. It is a Special Mook aligned with Electricity Damage, with immunityto Electricity Damage.

feats.title: Chain Lightning
feats.description: Strain +2. When casting an Attack spell, each time the Strike hits, the Attack jumps to a different target within 5 meters, and you make a new Attack against that character. A character can only be hit once by this effect.You can use bodies of water, metal items, and electrical machines to make additional jumps.

feats.title: Flash
feats.description: Strain +3.When you use an Attack spell, you also create a powerful light. Characters within 10 meters become Blinded 2. You are immune to this effect.

feats.title: Redirect Electricity
feats.description: When you take Electricity damage, you can Redirect (R) it to a target of your choice within 5 meters. You suffer no damage from it.

Abilities.title: Mind Magic
Abilities.description: Mind Magic allows you to directly assault or influence another character’s mind.◆ Attack (1), Strain 1. Psychic Damage. Attack VS Resolve.◆ Character (0), Focus, Strain 3. You charm a character while talking to them, such as when using Make an Argument action. The target gains +1 Affinity towards you,until the end of the scene. This spell is very subtle, so the difficulty to notice the casting is a Daunting (20) Call Bluff Check. ◆ Object (1), Focus, Strain 3. You imbue a strong emotion to an object. Any character that touches the object gets an urge to do a specific action at least once per round as long as they touch it. A character can resist this urge by making a Difficult (15) Resolve Check. This effect lasts until you Rest.

feats.title: Geas
feats.description: Strain +3.When you use a Character spell on aDefeated character, you may cast it with (3) instead. If you do, you set a Geas on them, a taboo they cannot break. This is a prohibiting command, meaning it doesn’t compel them to act. However, whenever they break the taboo, they suffer as if you cast an Attack spell on them.

feats.title: Amnesia
feats.description: Strain +2. When you cast a character spell on a target, they will not remember the interaction you had. If you meet them for the first time during it, they will not remember your face or mannerisms. The target must succeed at an Extreme (25) Perception Check to remember.

feats.title: Dream Control
feats.description: If you cast a character spell on a sleeping character, you can cast the spell with (2) to influence their dreams. You can choose events that occur in the dream and things that they remember especially well after waking up. Roll VS Resolve. On a Critical Failure, the character wakes up immediately.The Geas lasts indefinitely until removed by ritual or Essence magic.

Abilities.title: Nature Magic
Abilities.description: Nature magic manipulates plants and living creatures.◆ Attack (1), Focus, Strain 1. Slash or Pierce damage, Grapple.◆ Character (1), Focus, Strain 5, VS Perception. You turn the character into an animal. They retain their base statistics and gain the abilities of the animal. An animal that is unable to attack meaningfully (a sheep or a rabbit) cannot meaningfully harm anyone. This effect lasts for 3 rounds.◆ Environment (1), Focus, Strain 3. You cause plants to grow rapidly in the area, entangling characters within. Characters in the area must make a Difficult (15) Mobility Check or become Immobilized by the vines when you cast the spell and whenever it counts down. This effect lasts for 3 Rounds, andthe vines can be cut down to free oneself.◆ Summon (2) Focus, Strain 2. You summon a wood elemental and Command it. It is a Strong mook with the Tough and Skilled (Force) Traits. It has Weakness 5 to Fire Damage.

feats.title: Curse of Transformation
feats.description: Strain +3. The Character spell becomes a curse that must be undone with a Ritual or Essence magic. You become Exhausted.

feats.title: Natural Toxins
feats.description: Strain +1. When casting an Attack spell, you may have it deal Toxic or Acid damage in addition to the first type.

feats.title: Treant's Call
feats.description: Strain +2. When you use a Summon spell, the elemental becomes Large and its HP increases to 20.

Abilities.title: Object Magic
Abilities.description: Object Magic allows you to summon and manipulate objects.◆ Attack (1), Focus, Strain 2. Physical damage (any type). You summon a weapon that lasts until you Refresh and make a Melee or Ranged Strike with it. You may use your Special Proficiency for Attacks with the weapon.◆ Environment (2), Focus, Strain 2. You create Hazardous Terrain with spikes that deal Pierce damage.◆ Object (1), Focus, Strain 2. Increase the Item Bonus granted by the object by +2. This effect lasts for 3 rounds.◆ Summon (1), Focus. Summon an itemto your hand. The strain cost of the item is equal to its Rarity. The item is obviously magical, and it lasts until you Rest. It cannot replicate the effects of magic items or consumables.

feats.title: Attack Expert
feats.description: When using the Attack spell, you may instead use any valid Attack action (including Force actions) with the weapon you summon.

feats.title: Summon Copy
feats.description: Strain +2. You summon an identical copy of the item you summoned with Attack or Summon Spell .

feats.title: Weaponcraft
feats.description: You add any of the following Weapon Traits to your Attack Spell, adding +2 to the Cost for each chosen: Agile, Breach, Forceful, Grapple, Reposition, Trip, Two-Hand, Unarmed.If the weapon is a Melee Weapon (i.e., you make a Melee Strike), you may spend +2 Strain make it gain 2m Range.

Abilities.title: Shadow Magic
Abilities.description: Shadow magic manipulates shadows and darkness.◆ Attack (1), Focus, Strain 1. Dark Damage.◆ Environment (1), Focus, Strain 3. You create an area of darkness that repels light. Within the area, any light sources only light up 1 meter.This effect lasts for 3 rounds.◆ Object (1), Focus, Strain 2. You create a shadow replica of the target item. It works exactly like the original, but is obviously made of shadow magic. It has all the traits the original has, including magic effects and enchantments. This effect lasts for 3 rounds.◆ Summon (2) Focus, Strain 4. You =animate a character’s visible shadow and Command it. It becomes a Special mook that deals Dark damage, and is immune to Phyiscal Damage.

feats.title: Creeping Darkness
feats.description: When casting an Environment spell, you can attach it to an Object or Character instead. The darkness follows it.

feats.title: Grasping Shadows
feats.description: When casting an Attack spell, you can Grapple insteadof making a Strike.

feats.title: Shadow Step (1)
feats.description: Strain 3. While in the shadows, you can instantly Teleport to another shadow or shaded area within 10 meters.You cannot jump if the area is in total darkness or bright light.

Abilities.title: Summoning Magic
Abilities.description: Summoning magic deals with summoning creatures. You gain a Trait Repertoire.◆ Summon (2), Focus. You summon a character (animal, monster, person) and Command it. The character is a Mook and has any number of Traits from yourTrait Repertoire. The Strain Cost is equal to the Trait Budget of the summoned character (minimum 2). Summons cannot use Summon spells.

feats.title: Dual Summon
feats.description: Strain +3. You summon an identical copy of the character. When Commanded, the summoned characters gain 3 shared Action Points.

feats.title: Empower Summon
feats.description: Strain +2. When you cast any Summon Spell, the summoned character is more powerful. It is an Elite Mook.

feats.title: Extra Traits
feats.description: You gain any four Traits to your Trait Repertoire.

feats.title: Trait Repertoire
feats.description: Each Summoner has a number of Traits, equal to their level (minimum 1), which they can use when using Summoning Magic.This is their Trait Repertoire.See the Adversary Traits on p. 200. Traits in your repertoire are specific, meaning they must be exact in application. For example, you cannot take Immunity as a trait, but you can take Fire Immunity as a trait. Similarly, if you choose Ability, Special Ability or Special Weakness, design it in advance with your Game Warden.

Abilities.title: Time Magic
Abilities.description: Time magic modifies the universal constant and perception of time.◆ Attack (1), Focus, Strain 3. True Damage. Can be used on Objects to Break them.◆ Character (1), Focus, Strain 3. Target character becomes your choice of Slowed 3 or Quickened 3. Make an Attack VS their Perception if they resist.◆ Environment (2), Focus, Strain 4. You turn back time on the environment, fixing any items or structures in the area.◆ Object (1), Focus, Strain 2. Youturn back time on the object. You can Repair the object using your Special proficiency.

feats.title: Delay Damage (R)
feats.description: Record the damage and conditions a character takes froma single source. You can cast a Character spell on that character, and instead of the normal effects, the effects from that source become Suspended 3, healing the damage and conditions. After the duration ends, the character suffers the effects of the source again.

feats.title: Hypercognition
feats.description: When casting a Character spell, you can target your own mind instead of your whole body. When you do, you quicken time in your mind. You can take up to 5 Seek or Recall Knowledge actions immediately.

feats.title: Time Stop
feats.description: Strain +7.When casting a Character spell, youcan target yourself and stop time entirely instead of the normal effect. You can immediately take up to 3 actions.

Abilities.title: Warp Magic
Abilities.description: Warp magic controls space in odd ways.◆ Character (1), Focus, Strain 2. You teleport yourself to target location in range. You teleport anything you’re carrying, but no other characters.◆ Environment (2), Focus, Strain 5. You create a portal that connects a location next to you and a location in range. The summoned portal is 2 meters in diameter and either appears midair or toa nearby wall. This effect lasts for 3 rounds.◆ Object (1), Focus, Strain 1. You teleport a target object heavy or lighter to a location within range or to your own free hand.

feats.title: Buddy Catch
feats.description: When casting a character spell, you can teleport an additional character per +3 Strain spent.

feats.title: Far Teleporter
feats.description: When casting a warp spell, the Range trait increases to 20 meters, and any increases to it also increase to 20 meters.When casting an Environment Spell, youcan cast it with (H) instead. If you do, you increase the distance to an equal amount of kilometers instead of meters.

feats.title: Warp Grasp
feats.description: Strain +3. When casting a Character Spell, youcan target a character within range instead of yourself. If the target resists, make an Attack VS Perception. On a Success, you teleport the character to a location of your choice within range.

Abilities.title: Water Magic
Abilities.description: Water magic controls water in all forms, but mostly in liquid.◆ Attack (1), Focus, Strain 2. Blunt damage. Repositions the target 1 meter backwards on Success or greater.◆ Character (1), Focus, Strain 3, VS Perception. Encases a character in a water bubble. They are Submerged, and may attempt to escape out with a Difficult (15) Mobility Check. On a Success, they fall outside of the bubble. The effect lasts as long as you Focus.◆ Environment (2), Focus, Strain 1. You create water in the form of rain or flood. The area and the area within 1 meter of it becomes Slowing Terrain asitis flooded. This effect lasts for 3 Rounds, after which the water evaporates.◆ Summon (2), Focus, Strain 3. Summon a Water Elemental and Command it. It is a Special Mook aligned withCold damage, with immunity to Fire Damage.

feats.title: Control Water
feats.description: When casting an Environment spell, you may instead control an existing body of water to create different kinds of terrain or hazards. This effect lasts for 3 rounds.

feats.title: Create Fog
feats.description: When casting an Environment spell, you may instead create a heavy fog in the area. Ranged Attacks and Seek Checks that have to pass through 1 meter of the fog have a Detriment. This effect lasts for 3 Rounds.

feats.title: Ice-cold Stream
feats.description: When casting an Attack spell, it gains Cold as an additional damage type.

Abilities.title: Wind Magic
Abilities.description: Wind magic controls winds and air.◆ Attack (1), Focus, Strain 1. Slash damage, Trip.◆ Character (1), Strain 2. You grant a character winds that carry them. They gain a +2 Status Bonus to their Speed and their Mobility Checks.This effect lasts for 3 turns.◆ Environment (1), Strain 4. You create a Wind (p. 37) blowing in the area. Make an Open Check against all characters in the area. For every character whose Toughness DV you beat, they are immediately pushed back 1 meter in the direction of the wind, or 2 meters on a Critical.◆ Summon (2), Strain 3. Summon a Command it. It is a Fast Mook with Skilled (Force) Trait.

feats.title: Invisible Winds
feats.description: When casting a Summon spell, the Wind Elemental is alsoInvisible.

feats.title: Powerful Gust
feats.description: When casting an attack spell, you can attempt to push a character away instead of dealing damage. Make a Check VS Toughness. On a Success, you push the target 2 meters away, 4 meters on a Critical Success. If the target hits something, it takes half of the distance as falling damage.

feats.title: Wind Step
feats.description: While Focusing on Wind Magic, you gain the effects of the Character Spell without needing to cast it or spend SPfor it.

Abilities.title: Hypnosis (1)
Abilities.description: Strain 2. You hypnotize a character within 5 meters with gaze, smell, or singing. Make a Check VS Resolve:◆ Success: They become Hypnotized 2◇ Critical: They become Hypnotized3You can Command a Hypnotized character, and theyspend an Action Point to fulfill the command.

feats.title: Appeal
feats.description: Hypnotized characters are also Charmed for the duration.

feats.title: Mass Hypnosis (2)
feats.description: Strain 5. You attempt to use Hypnosis on all characters within 5 meters of the target.

feats.title: Put to Sleep
feats.description: Strain +2. Instead of becoming Hypnotized, the target falls Unconscious. If the target is currently in Conflict with you, you have a Detriment to the Check.

Abilities.title: Inanimate Shift (2)
Abilities.description: Strain 4. You turn into an inanimate object. A character touching, inspecting, or Seeking you needs to succeed in a Difficult (15) Perception Check against your Deception value to determine that you are currently in the formof the object. You lack the functions of the item, so a blade is actually dullor the buttons don’t do anything.Characters have a Detriment to the Check if they don’;t know you have this ability. You remain in the form until you Undo (1) it.

feats.title: Dancing Item
feats.description: While shifted into an inanimate object, you can Move. You are Slowed in this form.

feats.title: Device Form
feats.description: Strain +2.You turn into a working device which can be operated like the real item. If you have the Dancing Item ability,you can Operate the device yourself.Your size cannot become more than one size larger than your current form. For example, if you’re Medium-sized, you can become a Large-sized object, but not larger.

feats.title: Weapon Form
feats.description: Strain +2.You turn into a weapon which can be used for Striking. If you have the Dancing Item Feat, you can make Strikes using yourself.

Abilities.title: Mimicry (3)
Abilities.description: Strain 3. You shapeshift to look like a character you have seen recently, either in person or in an image. This does not include clothes. You can also shift into a random person who bears no resemblance to anyone relevant.You gain a +4 Status Bonus to Deception Checks to pass yourself off as the person.

feats.title: Copy Mannerisms
feats.description: You fake mannerisms perfectly. A character interacting with you will never think that you are a fake if they are unaware of your shapeshifting ability.They might think something is wrong with you and question you if you blatantly fail to uphold character.

feats.title: Second Identity
feats.description: You have a complete second identity as a person who is either deceased or simply not real.You have completely different friends and even vocations as this person.Discuss your second identity with the GW.

Abilities.title: Precognition
Abilities.description: Focus, Strain 2. When you Scrutinize another character, you also predict events that are going to unfold. Choose a target characterand make a Difficult (15) Check.◆ Success: The GW tells you up to 2 actions the character is going to do this round. If you communicate the actions to other characters in a way that the target can perceive, their actions will change (and you will not know them).◇ Critical: As Success, but it is up to 3 actions the character is going to do.

feats.title: Predictable Moves
feats.description: When you’ve used Precognition on a character and gained a Success or greater, you also gain a +3 Status Bonus to your Defenses against that character’s Attacks for 3 rounds.RetrocognitionStrain 4. When you Search a location, you gain a Benefit to the Search Check. You gain glimpses into events that have happened in the location.You can ask a question about something that happened inthe past in the location.

feats.title: Social Precog
feats.description: When you use Precognition during a discussion or Social Conflict, you gain insight to the exact things and arguments the character is going to say.If you refute these things before the character says them, you gain a Benefit to your Make an Argument Check towards them.

Abilities.title: Pyrokinesis (0)
Abilities.description: Focus, Strain 2. You can create and control fires within 5 meters of you. You can snuff them out, enlarge them, or make specific shapes with them. These actions are Interact Actions.You can use flames for Melee and Ranged Strikes in range aslong as you Maintain Focus. They deal d8 Fire Damage.All ground in fire counts as Hazardous Terrain that deals d6 Fire Damage.You can upkeep your Pyrokinesis by spending 1 Strain Point as you Maintain Focus on it each turn.

feats.title: Extreme Heat
feats.description: Strain +1. When you use Pyrokinesis, you create extreme heat in your location as long as you Maintain Focus on Pyrokinesis. All characters within 3 metersof you take d6 Fire Damage at the beginning of each round.If a character takes this damage twice on subsequent rounds, they will start Burning.When you maintain Extreme Heat, you leave a burning trail in your wake as you Move, creating Hazardous Terrain onto each space you move through.

feats.title: Far Reach
feats.description: Strain +1.You can control fires within 20 meters of you, and your Ranged Strikes gain Range Increment of 10 meters.

feats.title: Flame-Resistant
feats.description: You gain Resistance 10 to Fire Damage while you Focus on Pyrokinesis.

Abilities.title: Telekinesis (1)
Abilities.description: Focus, Strain 1. You manipulate or interact with a heavy or lighter object.◆ Range: 10 meters◆ Effect: You Interact (1) with an object, make it fly to your hand, or move it up to 5 meters in any direction. It stays in your control as long as you Focus each turn on Telekinesis.You can add one additional target each round youFocus on Telekinesis. You must spend 1 SP per turn to maintain it.

feats.title: Flex Mind
feats.description: Strain +4. You can interact with a much heavier target, such as a portcullis or vehicle. Increase your range to 100 meters.

feats.title: Levitate Character
feats.description: Strain +2. You levitate a character of your size or smaller. Make a Check VS the target’s Toughness.◆ Success: The target is Immobilized. You can move them up to 5 meters.◇ Critical: As Success, but the target is also Restrained

feats.title: Telekinetic Strike (1)
feats.description: Strain 2. You make a Melee Strike with an object or character that you’re controlling with Telekinesis. The target of the strike must be within 5 meters of the target you’re levitating.◆ Damage: d10 Physical (depending on the held target)If you use a character to make a Telekinetic Strike, both targets take the damage you deal.

Abilities.title: Telepathy(1)
Abilities.description: Focus, Strain 1. You communicate with another character telepathically.◆ Range: 50 meters◆ Effect: You can converse with that character telepathically.

feats.title: Far Message (3)
feats.description: Focus, Strain 8. You send a message across the world. Target any character you are familiar with within the world. Dimensional or solar distances incur difficulties.You send them a vivid message of visions and speech, which may be interpreted as a dream or a hallucination they see.

feats.title: Listen to Thoughts (1)
feats.description: Focus, Strain 2. You can listen in on people’s thoughts. You gain whispers of thoughts from all characters within 10 meters.All whispers sound the same, making it difficult to determine whose thoughts you hear, but you can usually figure out which thoughts are from your allies.

feats.title: Telepathic Command (1)
feats.description: Focus, Strain 5. You utter a single word and telepathically force someone to obey. This is generally a single action like “Fall,” “Run,” or “Strike.” Make a CheckVS a Character’s Resolve.◆ Range: 50 meters◆ Effect: The character will immediately take the Action (0).

Abilities.title: Gourmand (E)
Abilities.description: _Requires Crafting_You make a hearty meal if you have ingredients to use. You can make food for up to 6 characters. Each character that eats it gains Temporary Hit Points equal to twotimes your Crafting Rank (2 to 10).These Temporary Hit Points last until they Rest.

feats.title: Packaged Meal
feats.description: You can prepare the food in advance and store it. Instead of eating the food immediately, each character gains a Light item containing their food, which can be Eaten (3) to gain the benefits.

feats.title: Seconds!
feats.description: You always prepare an extra bit of food. You can either feed one additional character, or one character can take seconds.Taking seconds allows a character to regain 5 Hit Points.

feats.title: Stewpot
feats.description: You can reduce the Temporary Hit Points gained from the food to just your Proficiency Rank (1 to 5), but you can take another Exploration Action while using Gourmand.

Abilities.title: Hardware
Abilities.description: _Requires Crafting_You can use your tools as simple melee weapons. You canDraw (1) a tool weapon from your Kit. Whenever using a tool as a weapon, choose one of the options noted.You can make Strikes with Tool Weapons using your Skill Proficiency.| Tool Weapons    | Description    || --- | --- || Bludgeon | One-handed Melee, d8 Blunt, Break, Slow || Puncture | One-handed Melee, d6 Pierce, Agile || Sharp | One-handed Melee, d6 Slash, Fatal || Power Tools | Description || Drill | One-handed, d8 Pierce, Breach, Loud, Fatal || Saw | Two-handed (Huge), d12 Slash, Break, Loud, Activated, Slow || Sledge | Two-handed (Heavy), d10 Blunt, Breach, Break, Slow |

feats.title: Power Tools
feats.description: You gain heavier or powered tools which you can use as tool weapons. These weapons need to be Equipped. You can change the Power Toolsyou have with you when you go Shopping .

feats.title: Tool Juggler
feats.description: All of your tools gain the Thrown (2m) trait. You can also Swap (0) between two Tool weapons.

feats.title: UniversalKey
feats.description: You can use your Tool weapons to use Manipulate Device against locks, doors, and similar devices with Crafting.

Abilities.title: Jury-Rig
Abilities.description: _Requires Crafting_You can Build and Repair items and structures even when you don't have the necessary tools or materials at hand. Someone trying to Break a Jury-Rigged object has a Benefit to the Check.Special: Jury-rigged shields Break whenthey take damage equal to at least their Block value from one source.

feats.title: Instant Fix (1)
feats.description: Strain 2. You Repair an object with JuryRigging.

feats.title: Quick Builder (E)
feats.description: You can Jury-Rig structures together at incredible speeds. You Build a small structure.

feats.title: Universal Adhesive
feats.description: When you Jury-Rig an object together, it does not grant the Benefit to Breaking it until the beginning of next Horizon Turn.

Abilities.title: Scrapper (E)
Abilities.description: _Requires Crafting_You find unique and clever uses for random scrap. Whenever you Build or Craft, you can use an additional Exploration Action to find fitting materials for the object, no matter how unlikely. The object gains a Fatal Flaw (p. 33).

feats.title: Explosive Scrap
feats.description: Whenever you build or craft an item using Scrapper, the item has jutting edges and other hazards. Whenever someone attempts to Break it, it turns into a Trap (p. 39) for the assailant.

feats.title: It Works Once.
feats.description: When you use Scrapper, you can increase the maximum Rarity of the item by +3. If you do, the item is volatile, and can be used only once before it explodes violently, turning it into a Trap for the user.

feats.title: Scrap Savant
feats.description: Remove the Fatal Flaw from the object created with Scrapper.

Abilities.title: Specialist Crafter
Abilities.description: _Requires Crafting_Choose Apparel , Weapons, Utility Items or a Setting-specific item type (like Alchemical items or Bionics).When crafting those items, increase the maximum rarity of the items you can craft by 1 and lower the cost of crafting to the item's Rarity value minus 2 (minimum 1).

feats.title: Break Points
feats.description: You can use Break or Sunder actions for your specialist item type with Crafting.

feats.title: Quick Fixer (3)
feats.description: You Repairan item of your specialist type.

feats.title: Topical Expert
feats.description: You can Recall Knowledge (1) about your specialist item type using Crafting instead of a Knowledge skill.

Abilities.title: Confabulate (0)
Abilities.description: _Requires Deception_Strain 2. When someone successfully makes a Call Bluff Check on you, you come up with an excuse or even more outrageous lie to make up for it.

feats.title: Charming Liar
feats.description: If you Lieand a character doesn’t Call Bluff or Critically Fails the Check during the scene, the character’s Affinity increases by +1 toward you until the endof the current Exploration Round.=

feats.title: Discreet Inquiry
feats.description: Come up with a cover story. You can Gather Information using Deception.

feats.title: False Argument
feats.description: You can use Make an Argument using Deception, as long as the argument contains a falsehood or misleading information.

Abilities.title: Grand Distraction (2)
Abilities.description: _Requires Deception_Strain 2. Distract targets all characters in a 5-meter radius area where the center is within 10 meters of you.

feats.title: All Eyes On Me (1)
feats.description: Strain 3. You use Grand Distraction while inStealth. You reveal yourself and automatically gain a Critical Success against all targets. However, all targets will perceive you and gain a Benefit to all Perception Checks involving you for the duration of Distracted.

feats.title: Elaborate Setup (E)
feats.description: You spend time setting up your Grand Distraction. You use Grand Distraction with (R), and will automatically gain a Success on it against all targets, except against characters that know you set it up.

feats.title: Stunning Display
feats.description: Spend a Kit Charge. The distraction is so loud or disorienting that characters become Stunned for the duration of Distracted.

Abilities.title: Wisecrack(1)
Abilities.description: _Requires Deception_You crack a distracting joke to a character within 5 meters, maybe relating to their mother. Make a Check VS Resolve.◆ Success: They become Confused 2◇ Critical: They become Confused 3◆ Failure: No effect◇ Critical: Lower the target's Affinity by -1.

feats.title: Emotional Damage
feats.description: When you get a Critical Success with Wisecrack, you can have a single targeted character to also take d4 Psychic Damage.

feats.title: Jeer (2)
feats.description: Strain 2. Use Wisecrack on any number of characters within 10 meters. The Check is Open.

feats.title: Punchline(1)
feats.description: If you Failed but didn’t Critically Fail a Wisecrack Check you made this turn, you retake it with a Benefit.

Abilities.title: Bolstering Cheer (1)
Abilities.description: _Requires Diplomacy_Strain 1. You Cheer. On a Success, the character you target gains 5 Temporary Hit Points for the duration of Inspired.The target becomes immune to Bolstering Cheer until they Refresh.

feats.title: Lasting Cheer
feats.description: The ally becomes Inspired 4 instead.

feats.title: Rousing Show (2)
feats.description: Strain 2. You put up a rousing show. You use Bolstering Cheer, targeting all allies within 5 meters of you.

feats.title: Strike True
feats.description: The allies gain a +3 Status Bonus to their Strikes for the duration.

Abilities.title: Command Ally (1)
Abilities.description: _Requires Diplomacy_You command an ally within 5 meters. Specify an action, such as Strike, Trip, or Feint, oran Ability the ally has. If the allyuses the specified action before the end of the round, they gain a +2 Status Bonus to the Check. You cannot target yourselfwith Command Ally.

feats.title: All Together! (2)
feats.description: Strain 3. You use Command Ally individually on each ally within range. Each instance counts as a separate Command and may have different Actions.

feats.title: Do It Now! (0)
feats.description: Strain 2. Your command gives the ally an opportunity to act. Immediately as you give the command, they can use the Follow Command (R) Reaction to use the action.

feats.title: Let's Go!
feats.description: Whenever you use Command Ally, you gain a +2 Status Bonus to the same action until the end of the round.

Abilities.title: Haggler
Abilities.description: _Requires Diplomacy_You can Haggle the price of an item down during Shopping. Make a Diplomacy Check. The Difficulty Value depends on the Rarity of the Item.Some merchants may gain their Diplomacy Bonus to the Haggle DV.◆ Rarity 1-5 =3D Difficult (15)◆ Rarity 6-8 =3D Daunting (20)◆ Rarity 9-10 =3D Extreme (25)On a Success, the price of the item is -1. On a Critical Failure, the price of the item is +1.

feats.title: Bartering
feats.description: If you offer an item of Rarity -1 or higher in exchange for the item, lower the DV of the Haggle Check by 1 tier.If you fail the Haggle Check, you do not lose the item.

feats.title: Dirty Trick
feats.description: You claim to find a flaw in the item to try to push the price down. Make a Difficult (15) Deception Check. On a Success, you gain a Benefit to the Haggle Check.

feats.title: Salefinder
feats.description: When you Gather Information about a location, you also gain a Sale Token. You can use the Sale Token to lower the price of an item by -1 when you go Shopping in that location.This does not stack with Haggling.

Abilities.title: Rhetoric (0)
Abilities.description: _Requires Diplomacy_Strain 3. When you Make an Argument, you can use rhetoric to upgrade a Critical Failure to a Failure.

feats.title: Confutatio (1)
feats.description: If you go through the points against your argument and refute them before you Make an Argument, you gain a +2 Circumstance Bonus to the Check.
