feats.title: Exordium (1)
feats.description: Strain 3. You prime the listener for your argument. Come up with an idea or point that leads to your argument looking better. You gain a Benefit to that Make an Argument Check.

feats.title: Memoria (1)
feats.description: Strain 3. You reiterate an argument you already made. You can reroll the Check for Make an Argument.

Abilities.title: Streetwise
Abilities.description: _Requires Diplomacy_You can Gather Information from the criminal underworld. Regardless of the result, you gain one question you can ask about the subject.

feats.title: Know Somebody
feats.description: You have contacts in many places. You gain an Acquaintance Token. You can spend this Token to immediately find a character with a skillset you need right now, such as a specific Knowledge Skill or Basic Skill. You regain the Acquaintance Token when you useStreetwise.

feats.title: Person of Interest
feats.description: Whenever you Gather Information on a character or group, you will know whether they have an involvement in crime, and which criminal groups, if any.

feats.title: Threat Detector
feats.description: Whenever you Gather Information about a location, you will always gain accurate knowledge of the Threats near the area.

Abilities.title: Footwork
Abilities.description: _Requires Force_You gain no Detriments to using Force Actions withouta Free Hand.

feats.title: Low Sweep(2)
feats.description: Strain 2. You sweep people off their feet. You Trip all characters within your UnarmedReach. Make the Check only once.

feats.title: Step On (1)
feats.description: When you Grapple a Prone target, on a Success or greater, they are Restrained.

feats.title: Unbalancing Kick (1)
feats.description: Strain 1. Reposition a character directly away from you. On a Success or greater, they are also Off-Guard 2.

Abilities.title: Tackle (2)
Abilities.description: _Requires Force_Strain 2. You Move and tackle a target in your unarmed reach at the end of the movement. Make a Check VS Toughness.◆ Success: You and the target moveup to 2 meters, are both Prone, and the target is Grappled.◇ Critical: As success, but the target is also Restrained.◆ Failure: The target is Grappled. ◇ Critical: You fall Prone.

feats.title: Covering Dive (R)
feats.description: Strain 2. You dive in to save an ally when they would be attacked or take damage from an effect. You Tackle an Ally, automatically succeeding inthe Check. The ally gains a +4 Circumstance Bonus against theAttack or Effect (such as an Explosion). You automatically Release (0) the ally unless it is deleterious to them.If this was made in Reaction against a Hazard or an Area of Effect, you are also targeted by it.

feats.title: Extending Jump
feats.description: Strain +1. You can Jump in addition to the Move action(s) before making the Tackle Check.

feats.title: Headlong Charge (3)
feats.description: Strain +2. You Move 3 times instead.Can be used in Chase Conflict to Advance up to 3 times before making the Tackle check.

Abilities.title: Wrestler
Abilities.description: _Requires Force_You gain a +2 Circumstance Bonus to Grapple, Reposition, and Trip Checks if you have two hands free.Titan WrestlerYou lower the DV to Force Checks against larger targets by 1 Tier per Proficiency Rank, down to Standard (10).

feats.title: Throw Character (1)
feats.description: Strain 2. You throw a Character you’reGrappling. You Release the Grapple and make an Attack VS Toughness.

feats.title: ◆ Success: The character flies up to 3m away.
feats.description: ◇ Critical: The character flies upto 4 meters away and takes Falling Damage for the flight.

feats.title: Wrestling Move (1)
feats.description: Strain 1. You manipulate a Grappled target by wrestling. Make an Attack VS their Toughness. On a Success, choose one of the following effects.◆ Body Drop: The target becomes Prone and Slowed 1. You release the Grapple.◆ Lock: You lock the opponent's joints. They are Restrained until yourGrapple ends.◆ Suplex: Use the same result for an Unarmed Strike that deals d8 Blunt Damage. The opponent becomes Prone on the spot or on the opposite side of you.You release the Grapple.

Abilities.title: Interrogate (E)
Abilities.description: _Requires Intimidation_You interrogate a captured, defeated, or willing character. You gain a Benefit to Call Bluff Checks for the duration.

feats.title: Bad Cop
feats.description: You gain a Benefit to Pressure Checks while Interrogating someone.

feats.title: Disorienting Speech (3)
feats.description: You speak in a disorienting and illogical manner, making baseless accusations and claiming truth in falsehoods. Make a Check VS the target's Resolve during an Interrogation. On a success, they are Confused until the end of the Interrogation.

feats.title: Good Cop
feats.description: When you try to ease up on the person being interrogated, you gain a Benefit to Make an Argument Checks against them.

Abilities.title: Growl (2)
Abilities.description: _Requires Intimidation_Strain 2. You Intimidate all characters within 10 meters. You take no penalty for additional characters.

feats.title: Bellow
feats.description: Strain +1. Increase the range of Growl to 20 meters.This action is Loud.

feats.title: Paralyzing Sound
feats.description: Characters you Critically Succeed against with Growlare also Immobilized for the duration of Frightened.They can roll a Difficult (15) Resolve Check at the beginning of each round, removing Immobilized on a Success.

feats.title: Quickened Roar
feats.description: Strain +2. Reduce the action cost of Growl to (1).

Abilities.title: Threatening Presence
Abilities.description: _Requires Intimidation_You gain a +2 Status Bonus to your Intimidation Checks against Defeated or Cornered characters.

feats.title: By The Cuff
feats.description: You gain the Threatening Presence Bonus against characters that are Grappled by you.

feats.title: Constant Pressure
feats.description: When a character comes within 3m of you for the first time in a Scene, they can feel the pressure you exert. You may Intimidate (0) them.Your allies are immune to this effect, and you can choose to not exert the pressure.

feats.title: Scary Stride (1)
feats.description: You Glare at a target and Move (1) towards them. If a character tries to take a Reaction against you, you Glare (0) at them, and on a Success or greater, the Reaction is disrupted.

Abilities.title: Apothecary
Abilities.description: _Requires Medicine_You can use Medicine for Checks to Craft Medical items regardless of Rarity.

feats.title: Always Prepared
feats.description: Your Medical Kit has a variety of Medical Items. You can use Charges from your Kit to produce items with the Medical tag.

feats.title: Herbalism(E)
feats.description: You spend time gathering roots and herbs. These can be used as a substitute for the crafting cost of any medicine or to regain one Charge for your Medical Kit.

feats.title: Powerful Remedies
feats.description: When you craft Medical items, those medical items additionally heal +5 Hit Points.

Abilities.title: Battle Medicine (1)
Abilities.description: _Requires Medicine_You use Treat Wounds on an adjacent character using a Free Hand. Spend a Kit Charge and make a Difficult (15) Check.◆ Success: Treat your Proficiency one step lower than your current Rank.◇ Critical: Treat your Proficiencyas equal to your current Rank. ◆ Failure: You fail to Treat Wounds. The Charge is wasted.

feats.title: Emergency Fix-up
feats.description: When using Battle Medicine successfully, the target also ignores the effects and HP penalty of one Injury until the end ofthe Conflict Phase.

feats.title: Medical Assurance
feats.description: When using Battle Medicine, you always gain at least a Success from the Check.

feats.title: Pat on the Back
feats.description: After successfully using Battle Medicine on an ally, they also gain 5 Temporary Hit Points. You do not gain this benefit when you use it on yourself.

Abilities.title: Full-Time Care (H)
Abilities.description: _Requires Medicine_You take care of a character that is Recuperating. At the end of the Action, you heal all of their Persistent Conditions, including Injuries . You cannot target yourself with Full-Time Care.This removes the Hit Point penalty of Grievous Injuries, but not any penalties to other features.

feats.title: Hospitalier
feats.description: You can use Full-Time Care on up to three different characters at a time.

feats.title: Rehab
feats.description: You help with rehabilitating Permanent

feats.title: Conditions. Any numerical penalties from a Permanent Condition are halved permanently. This effect can be gained once per Condition.
What Doesn't Kill You
feats.description: Being under your care strengthens the character. The character gains 5 Temporary Hit Points that do not go away until spent.

Abilities.title: Surgery (E)
Abilities.description: _Requires Medicine_You attempt to heal an Injury with surgery. Make a Difficult (15) Medicine Check.◆ Success: The character will automatically succeed on the Recovery Check towards the Injury.◇ Critical: You immediately fix the Injury. Remove the Injury without the Recuperate action.◆ Failure: The character will gain a Benefit to the Recuperate action.◇ Critical: You botch the surgery.The character will gain a Detriment to the Recuperate action.If you use Surgery on a Grievous Injury, the procedure only allows the character to Recuperate, unless some radical measure (such as reattaching a dismembered hand) is performed.

feats.title: Reinforced Body
feats.description: You reinforce the place of injury with small bits of metal or similar hard material. The character gains a Hardened token. Whenever they are targeted by an effect that would deal Physical Damage, they canspend the Hardened Token and reduce the Damage taken by 5.

feats.title: Risky Surgery
feats.description: Strain 3. You take radical measures while treating the character. Increase the DV of the Surgery to Daunting (20). Success is upgraded to Critical Success and Failure is downgraded to Critical Failure.

feats.title: Steady Hand
feats.description: Under normal circumstances, upgrade any Critical Failures to Failures. Does not apply to Risky Surgery.

Abilities.title: Aquatic
Abilities.description: _Requires Mobility_Swimming is not Slowing Terrain for you.

feats.title: Dive (0)
feats.description: Strain 2. You gain Air 10. For the duration,Hold Breath doesn’t spend Strain Points.

feats.title: Skilled Swimmer
feats.description: You ; gain  a  +2-meter  Circumstance Bonus to your Speed when you swim.

feats.title: Underwater Senses
feats.description: When you’re underwater, you can sense your surroundings. You gain a +2 Circumstance Bonus to Perception while underwater.

Abilities.title: Athleticism
Abilities.description: _Requires Mobility_Increase your Speed by your Proficiency Rank in Mobility (+1 to +5).

feats.title: High Jumper
feats.description: You automatically Vault when you finish a Jump to a higher location.

feats.title: Long Jumper
feats.description: Increase your Jump’s length and Failure Effect to half of your Speed +2.

feats.title: Kip Up (0)
feats.description: Strain 2. You Move to stand up. You don't provoke Reactions with this Movement.You can do this Action with (R) as a Reaction to falling Prone.

Abilities.title: Dodge Roll (R)
Abilities.description: _Requires Mobility_Strain 1. You Dodge, and you may also move up to 1 meter per your Mobility Rank. This movement happens after the Attack has resolved.

feats.title: Land in Cover
feats.description: Strain +1.You can Take Cover at the end of your Dodge Roll.

feats.title: Roll Through
feats.description: You may Tumble through an opponent’s space when you use Dodge Roll.

feats.title: Sticky Situation
feats.description: You may use Dodge Roll to avoid a deleterious area effect, like an Explosion. This movement happens before the effect.

Abilities.title: Follow (R)
Abilities.description: _Requires Mobility_You follow an Ally within 5 metersthat takes a Move Action or Reaction. You copy their steps aswell as possible. You can only move a distance equal to your Ally's movement.

feats.title: Orbiting
feats.description: Strain 1. When following an Ally, you can decide to end your movement at any space adjacent to them, as long as your movement allows for it.

feats.title: Persistence
feats.description: If the target takes multiple Move actions in succession, you continue following them until they stop moving.

feats.title: Pursue
feats.description: Strain 2. You use Follow on an opponent.

Abilities.title: Parkour
Abilities.description: _Requires Mobility_

feats.title: Climbing, Vaulting, and Squeezing don’t count as Difficult Terrain. You can make Jumps as part of your Move actions, spending movement normally.
feats.description: If you run out of Speed in the middle of a Jump, you must either commit another action to Move or fall straight down.

feats.title: Acrobatic Landing (0)
feats.description: When you land a Jump, if you land in an elevated position from the ground (on top of an object, against a wall, on top of someone’s head), you can do a second Jump to land up to 3m away on the ground. You can only do this once per Round.

feats.title: Cat Fall
feats.description: When you use Landing and gain a Success or greater from it, you gain a Circumstance Bonus to the Resistance equal to 10 times your Mobility Rank (+10 to +50).This value is added before the benefit from a Critical Success is applied to the Falling Damage Resistance.In a more fantastical or heroic game, you may instead rule that Critical Success on a Landing Checkmakes you Immune to Falling Damage.

feats.title: Long Slide
feats.description: If you Move at least 2 meters before it, you can Squeeze up to 4 meters without being counted as Prone. You can Take Cover (0) at the end of the movement.The movement has to be continous into a single direction, because you are sliding. Making a turn requires a Dynamic Action.

Abilities.title: Lock Thump (1)
Abilities.description: _Requires Skullduggery_You Manipulate Device against a lock.

feats.title: From Afar
feats.description: Strain +2. You can use Lock Thump at a range of 5 meters by throwing an object.

feats.title: Master Lockpicker
feats.description: Lower the difficulty of all Manipulate Device Checks against locks by 1 tier.

feats.title: Not a Fluke
feats.description: You automatically succeed when using Lock Thump against locks you have picked before.

Abilities.title: Pocket Sand (1)
Abilities.description: _Requires Skullduggery_Strain 2. You deftly throw sand or dust into an opponent's eyes with a Free Hand. Make a Standard (10) Check VS Perception.The opponent must be within 2 meters of you.◆ Success: They are Blinded 2.◇ Critical: They are Blinded 3. ◆ Failure: They are Blinded 1.

feats.title: Kick Up
feats.description: You don't require a free hand, as you kick up dust or sand.

feats.title: Sand Sniper
feats.description: Strain +1. Increase the range of Pocket Sand to 4 meters.

feats.title: Wide Arc (2)
feats.description: Strain +1.You also target all characters adjacent to the target except for you.

Abilities.title: Sabotage (3)
Abilities.description: _Requires Skullduggery_You sabotage a device. The device is not broken, but it must be fixed with a Repair action. The exact effect of the Sabotage depends on the item.

feats.title: Fast Saboteur (1)
feats.description: Strain 1. You Sabotage.

feats.title: Quick Fix(1)
feats.description: You Repaira device you sabotaged.

feats.title: Violent Surprise
feats.description: When you Sabotage a device, it turns into a Trap (p. 39) for the next character that uses it.

Abilities.title: Snatch (1)
Abilities.description: _Requires Skullduggery_Strain 2. With a Free Hand, you snatch an item from another character. Choose an item you can see and reach and make a Pickpocket Check. If you choose a worn or held item, you fail the Check unless you get a Critical Success.You don't gain a Detriment to the Check from not being inStealth.

feats.title: Cut Loose
feats.description: Strain +2.You cut a worn item loose to take it. You gain a Benefit to a Checkto Snatch Apparel or an Equipped Item not in hand.

feats.title: Light Fingers
feats.description: Strain +1.When you use Snatch, the character won't notice the item is missing before they attempt to use it in some way.

feats.title: Loosen the Grip
feats.description: Strain +2. With a neat flick of the wrist, you loosen a character’s grip on a held item. You gain a Benefit to a Check to Snatch an item held in a hand.

Abilities.title: Tools of the Trade
Abilities.description: _Requires Skullduggery_You have various different tools and gadgets hidden on you. You gain 1 additional Kit charge, even when you're not wearing a Kit.

feats.title: Firecrackers (1)
feats.description: Spend a Kit Charge. You throw a bunch of firecrackers, scaring and distracting opponents. You throw a firecracker to a spot within 5 meters, with a 1-meter Explosive Radius. Instead of damage, it has the following effects.◆ Increment 1: Blinded 3◆ Increment 2: Blinded 2◆ Increment 3: Blinded 1Being in Cover reduces the gained Blinded Condition by 2.

feats.title: Hidden Lockpicks
feats.description: You have a lockpick or similar hidden on your person, such as in your hair, boots, or similarplace. You can use Manipulate Device Checks on locks without a Covert Kit.

feats.title: Smoke Bomb (1)
feats.description: Spend a Kit charge. You drop or throw a smoke bomb, creating a 4-meter area of smoke centered around a spot within 5 meters of you. Characters in the area or covered by it are Obscured for 3 Rounds.While Obscured , vision is blocked for the area. Targeting anything in the area or through it has a Detriment.

Abilities.title: Disappearance (1)
Abilities.description: _Requires Stealth_Strain 2. You disappear from sight. You Hideand gain Disappeared 2. Opponents have a Detriment to Seek you for the duration.

feats.title: Instant Disappearance (0)
feats.description: Strain +1. You use Disappearance during another action, such as Distract or Move.

feats.title: Like a Shadow
feats.description: While Disappeared is active, you gain a +4 Status Bonus to your Speed (+2 to Sneak).

feats.title: Shroud
feats.description: You gain Disappeared 3 instead.

Abilities.title: Hide In Plain Sight (1)
Abilities.description: _Requires Stealth_Strain 1. You Hide. As long as you don’t take any actions that require movement, you don’t trigger Vision.

feats.title: Camoflage
feats.description: When next to an object or structure, you gain Cover while using Hide In Plain Sight.

feats.title: Like a Statue
feats.description: Strain +2. You stop and pose like a statue. You can Hide In Plain Sight with (0) when you would trigger Vision.

feats.title: Hide in the Crowd
feats.description: If you move alongside other people (such as a crowded street), you enter Stealth andgain Cover from the crowd.

Abilities.title: Silence
Abilities.description: _Requires Stealth_You can use Mobility actions and the Move action without breaking Stealth. You ignore the Penalty from Noisy Apparel.

feats.title: Silent Command (1)
feats.description: You instruct an ally how to take an Action silently. Specify an Action and an Ally. If the Ally takes the Action this round, it does not break Stealth.

feats.title: Silent Killer
feats.description: You can use Combat Actions and Combat Abilities without breaking Stealth.

feats.title: Silent Skills
feats.description: You can use Skill Actions or Skill Abilities without breaking Stealth.

Abilities.title: Sneak Past (1)
Abilities.description: _Requires Stealth_Strain 1. You sneak past a character as they get distracted or look away. Choose one target and Sneak. You do not trigger Vision during the Sneak action from that character. You can chain multiple Sneak Past actions.

feats.title: Cover to Cover
feats.description: You can Take Cover (0) at the end of Sneak Past if you started the movement in Cover.

feats.title: Stealthy Climber
feats.description: Climbing is not Slowing Terrain for you while you Sneak Past.

feats.title: Triple Threat
feats.description: Strain +1. You can target up to three characters with Sneak Past.

Abilities.title: Bloodhound
Abilities.description: _Requires Survival_Your Track Checks are unaffected by weather conditions.

feats.title: Analyze Tracks
feats.description: You can Recall Knowledge about the target you’re Tracking when you Track it. Use Survival for the Recall Knowledge Check.

feats.title: Like a Scent
feats.description: You can follow a trail intuitively, like you had a scent. Upgrade Failures in Tracking Checks into Successes.

feats.title: Tracker's Intuition
feats.description: If you Critically Succeed in a Track Check, you gain some intuitive knowledge about the destination the tracked character is going to. This can be vague, like ”home” or ”nowhere particular”.

Abilities.title: Dumpster Gourmet (E)
Abilities.description: _Requires Survival_Strain 2. You ignore any environmental Detriments to Subsist Checks. You might find food that is thrown away, or questionable food like insects and worms.The food is quite unappetizing. Other characters need to make a Standard (10) Resolve Check to be able to eat the food.

feats.title: Scraps
feats.description: You always carry scraps with you. You can use a Charge from your Kit to get one character's worth of Dumpster Gourmet.

feats.title: Seasoning
feats.description: You are able to make the food a little more appetizing with seasoning. You remove the Resolve Check for other people.

feats.title: Slimy Yet Satisfying
feats.description: The food is nutritionally better than others might think. Each character that eats Dumpster Gourmet gains temporary HitPoints equal to your Proficiency Rank (1 to 5).

Abilities.title: Wildling
Abilities.description: _Requires Survival_You can Set UpCamp in the wilderness without a carrying a Kit. If you have a Kit, you can take an another Exploration Action when you Set Up Camp.

feats.title: Fauna Expert
feats.description: As you Harvest a creature or an animal’s carcass, you can Gather Information about the surrounding terrain by studying its build, body and entrails. Make the Check using Survival instead.

feats.title: Gatherer
feats.description: When you Subsist in the wilderness, you gain additional food and know the poisonous foods. Upgrade Critical Failures and Failures by one tier.

feats.title: Wilderness Navigator
feats.description: If you Navigate in the wilderness, you gain a Benefit to the Check as long as you can see landforms or the night sky.

Abilities.title: Diverse Knowledge
Abilities.description: _Requires a Knowledge Skill_If you have two or more knowledge skills that apply to the same Check, you gain a +2 Circumstance Bonus for each additional Knowledge Skill that applies.

feats.title: Hybrid Theory
feats.description: When making a skill Check on any basic skill, you gain a +2 Circumstance Bonus for each Knowledge Skill that applies to the Check.

feats.title: Unlikely Knowledge
feats.description: You have gathered knowledge and trivia. You can spend 1 Fate Point to automatically succeed on a Recall Knowledge Check.

feats.title: Well-Learned
feats.description: You gain Proficiency in two Knowledge or Niche Skills.

Abilities.title: Hidden Knowledge
Abilities.description: _Requires a Knowledge Skill_You have knowledge about things that you shouldn't, such as something classified, forbidden, or otherworldly. You don't gain a Penalty to Recall Knowledge and Gather Information about hidden or taboo subjects.You should determine with your GW what subjects this Hidden Knowledge touches upon.

feats.title: Lie Through Obscurity
feats.description: You gain a +3 Circumstance Bonus to your Lie Action if you incorporate your Hidden Knowledge into the lie.

feats.title: Secret Technology
feats.description: You can Operate or Manipulate Device for any devices related to your Hidden Knowledge without penalties.

feats.title: The Devil You Know
feats.description: You gain a +2 Circumstance Bonus to Resolve against characters relating to yourHidden Knowledge.

Abilities.title: I Read About This!
Abilities.description: _Requires a Knowledge Skill_You gain a Scholastic token. You can spend this Scholastic token to automatically succeed on a Recall Knowledge Check. You regain your Scholastic Token when you Study (E) abook you haven’t read before.

feats.title: Bookworm (2)
feats.description: You happen to carry just the right book with you. Spend your Scholastic Token. You open a book and Recall Knowledge. Yougain a Critical Success on the Check.If you're targeting a creature, you gain all the relevant information about said creature, such as its weaknesses and its abilities.

feats.title: By The Book
feats.description: Whenever you use a Scholastic Token to Recall Knowledge about a character or creature, you gain a +2 Circumstance Bonus to your next Check towards it.

feats.title: Hit The Books (E)
feats.description: When in a library, bookshop, archive, or similar location with a lot of information, you can peruse and Gather Information using your Skill Proficiency. You also gain a +2 Circumstance Bonus on the Check if the location fits your inquiry. You regain your Scholastic Token.

Abilities.title: Technobabble
Abilities.description: _Requires a Knowledge Skill_You can convincingly speak with very technical and difficult terms that make it hard for non-experts to follow.If you incorporate technobabble to Make an Argument, you gain a +2 Circumstance Bonus to the Check if the target is not an expert in the subject.

feats.title: Advanced Terminology
feats.description: You use terminology even experts may have never heard. When you use Technobabble on a Check, the target must make a Daunting (20) Knowledge Check first.On a failure, they become Confused 2.

feats.title: Out of Their Wheelhouse
feats.description: You can explain a thing in a confusing or intimidating way using Technobabble.You gain the circumstance bonus to Coerce and Intimidation Checks, and your Lie Valuewhen you use Technobabble.

feats.title: Talk Shop
feats.description: When talking to someone of a vocation similar to yours,you can use any and all Diplomacy Actions with a Knowledge Skill instead.

Abilities.title: Alchemical Crafting
Abilities.description: _Requires Crafting_You carry alchemical supplies with you, and can Craft special alchemical items aslong as you have a Crafting Kit.

feats.title: Potionomical
feats.description: You can craft alchemical items for cheaper. Treat the Rarity of Alchemical Items as -2 for crafting purposes, to a minimum of 1.

feats.title: Syringes
feats.description: You can store alchemical drinks or poisons as Syringes. When you do, you can Draw and Interact with them in the same action.Syringes can also be thrown to apply drinks or poisons by making a Ranged Strike againstthe target with a Range Increment of 2 meters. They always hit allies in the first Range Increment.

feats.title: Volatile Vials
feats.description: Whenever you Refresh, you can Craft a number of volatile alchemical items equal to your Skill Proficiency Rank (1 to 5)The materials used for these alchemical items are volatile, so the alchemical items are lost whenever you Refresh or Rest, meaning you cannot stack the effect of Volatile Vials with itself. The vials are obviously volatile and cannot be sold.=

Abilities.title: Herbal Remedy (3)
Abilities.description: _Requires Crafting_You are able to use common items and herbs to counteract poisons. You administer something you have at hand to yourself or another character, and it works as an Antidote.

feats.title: Clotting Salve (2)
feats.description: You administer a clotting salve to an ally in your reach. You reduce their Bleeding Condition by 2 without triggering its effects.

feats.title: Refreshing Drink (E)
feats.description: You can prepare an energizing herbal drink. If consumed within the current Exploration round, the character automatically Recovers from the Exhausted condition.

feats.title: Sobering Extract (3)
feats.description: You prepare a bad-tasting but very sobering extract. The person who consumes it immediately Recovers from the Drunk condition.

Abilities.title: Marvelous Mixer (3)
Abilities.description: _Requires Alchemical Crafting_You can mix the effects of two alchemical items. If you have two alchemical items at hand, you combine them into a single one with (3). This can be used to make deceptive items (potions that carry poison) or create stronger items.If you try to mix more than two alchemical items together, the mixture Explodes as an improvised Explosive.

feats.title: Double Up
feats.description: You measure the alchemical items exactly, allowing you to create two combined alchemical items instead of one.

feats.title: Empowered Brew
feats.description: If either of the items combined with Marvelous Mixer has the improvement effect, the other item gains the improvement effect as well.

feats.title: Turn to Gas
feats.description: Whenever you use Marvelous Mixer, you can instead gain the mixture as a gas. This can be captured into a bottle and released. When released (or thrown, breaking the bottle), creatures within 1 meter of its location take the effects of the combined alchemical item.

Abilities.title: Brute-Force (E)
Abilities.description: _Requires Knowledge: Computers_You make an algorithm brute-force a password. Make a Daunting (20) Knowledge: Computers Check.◆ Success: The password cracks.◇ Critical: The password cracks instantly. You regain the Exploration Action.◆ Failure: The brute-force is possible, but it will take (H) instead.◇ Critical: The architecture has countermeasures for Brute-Force. It cannot be done reasonably.

feats.title: Clever Methods
feats.description: You can sneak around the coding of the database. You upgrade any Critical Failures on Brute-Force to Failures.=

feats.title: Social Engineering
feats.description: You can find vulnerabilities in a network by talking to people who have access to it. You Gather Information about the database through calling or sending messages.

feats.title: Weakest Link
feats.description: You can figure out whether a person has a strong or a weak password at a glance. You gain a Benefit to Brute-Force Checks.

Abilities.title: Denial of Service (E)
Abilities.description: _Requires Knowledge: Computers_You flood a digital device with requests, slowing it down. To do anything with it requires Three Interact actions. This effect lasts for 1 Exploration round. You can set this up in advance and activate it with (1) with a device.

feats.title: Botnet
feats.description: You can use multiple devices to flood the target device. It crashes and cannot be used for the duration.

feats.title: Exploit Service
feats.description: During Denial of Service, your Checks to manipulate the affected devices or databases have a Benefit. This does not apply to your own devices.

feats.title: Speedy Setup (3)
feats.description: Focus, Strain 3. You set up a Denial of Service attack.

Abilities.title: Software Engineer
Abilities.description: _Requires Knowledge: Computers_You are able to make your own Software with the Craft action. Use Knowledge: Computers for it.

feats.title: Copy-Paste
feats.description: It’s easier to copy something and then modify it for your needs. Treat the rarity of Software items you Craft as -2.

feats.title: Hardware Engineer
feats.description: Any benefits you gain for crafting Software items are also applied to crafting Hardware items.

feats.title: Prepared in Advance
feats.description: You gain a Software token. You can spend the Software token to instantly gain a Software item as if you had Crafted it.=You regain the Software token after each Horizon action.

Abilities.title: Tech Wizard
Abilities.description: _Requires Knowledge: Computers_You can use two hacking-related actions simultaneously,as long as they have a similar action cost, such as using Exploration actions with Exploration actions.Your abilities are almost mystical. You can use the Special Path for Knowledge: Computers Checks and Hacking Abilities.

feats.title: Active Rewrite (E)
feats.description: Strain 4. You can rewrite a piece of software or database as you’re using it. When you do, you gain a +2 Item Bonus to all hacking-related Checks.

feats.title: Instant Hacking (3)
feats.description: Strain 4. You can instantly use a hacking-related Ability or Feat Action that normally requires an (E).

feats.title: Manipulate Real Life (3)
feats.description: Strain 3. You manipulate a real-life object wirelessly by hacking into networks that control them.You can manipulate alarms, doors, gates, sprinklers, etc., as if you used an Interact (1) action on them. You must have a plausible connection to the network that controls that device.

Abilities.title: Animal Friend
Abilities.description: _Requires Diplomacy_You easily befriend animals. You gain +2 Affinity towards Animals, communicate with them verbally and somewhat understand them.

feats.title: Calm Animal (2)
feats.description: Focus. Youcan attempt to calm an animal. Make a Difficult (15) Check against the Resolve of an animal within 5 meters. On a Success, the hostile animal calmsdown.

feats.title: Complex Communication
feats.description: You can communicate complex concepts to animals, and ask them to do more complex tasks, such as pressing buttons or pulling levers.

feats.title: Unnatural Friend
feats.description: You gain Animal Friend’s benefits for nonanimal creatures.You can take non-animal creatures as Animal Companions, but you must specifically Tame (H) them by making a Difficult (15) Dynamic Skill Check.

Abilities.title: Enchanting
Abilities.description: _Requires Crafting_You can enchant items. You can Craft Enchantments like any other items. Each item can have only one Enchantment.

feats.title: Dual-Enchanted (H)
feats.description: You carefully apply a second Enchantment to an item that already has one. You can only use Enchantments you could craft with(E).

feats.title: Disenchant (E)
feats.description: You disenchant an item, or remove a curse from an item.You can immediately transfer the Enchantment to another item.

feats.title: Temporary Enchantment (2)
feats.description: You put a temporary Enchantment on an item. It gains an Enchantment you could Craft with (E) for 3 rounds.

Abilities.title: Spell Encyclopedia
Abilities.description: _Requires Knowledge: Magic_You have memorized various spells. When you Scrutinize (1) and target a character that is Focusing on a Magic Ability, you gain a Benefit to the Check.

feats.title: Magic Analysis (1)
feats.description: You spend a moment analyzing a spell or magical effect.You Recall Knowledge about the magic, and gain a Benefit to the Check.

feats.title: Magic Intuition (0)
feats.description: You Scrutinize a single target that is Focusingon a Magic Ability.

feats.title: Spell Savant
feats.description: When you Scrutinize, you can target all characters Focusing on Magic Abilities within 10 meters of you.

Abilities.title: Spellbook
Abilities.description: _Requires Knowledge: Magic_You gain a spellbook which can hold spells. Your spellbook starts with a single Magic Ability inscribed within it.You gain a Spell Token, which you can use to cast one spell from an Ability inscribed into your Spellbook even if you do not have that Ability yourself. You regain the Spell Token when you Study (E) the Spellbook.You must hold your Spellbook in one hand when casting the spell.You can inscribe additional Magic Abilities into your Spellbook with a (H) per Ability. You must have access to the magic or help of someone who knows has the Magic Ability.

feats.title: Book Casting
feats.description: You use your arcane knowledge to cast spells from the Spellbook. When casting a spell with Spellbook or a feat from Spellbook, you can use your Knowledge: Magic Proficiency instead of your Special Proficiency.

feats.title: Floating Tome
feats.description: Your Spellbook can float, meaning you no longer need to hold it in your hand to use it.

feats.title: Spell Preparation
feats.description: When you Refresh (E), you may spend your Spell Tokenand prepare spells. Choose the Magic Abilities and Spell Traitsfor each spell individually, and spend the necessary Strain Points to cast them either before or after regaining theStrain Points from Refresh. You cannot prepare more spells than your rank in Knowledge: Magic. Normal limits on Spells’ Strain Costs apply.You are constantly Focusing on these spells, and may not use any other actions that require Focus. While Focusing on your Prepared Spells, you may cast any of them with (1) without paying their Strain Cost.If you lose Focus for any reason or Rest, you lose all of your Prepared Spells. You cannot Prepare additional spells when you’re Focusing on Prepared Spells.

Abilities.title: Basic Principles
Abilities.description: _Requires Crafting_You can use Crafting Proficiency to Operate instead of a Knowledge Skill. You gaina -2 Circumstance Penalty to the Check when you do.

feats.title: Engineer’s Eye
feats.description: You remove the Circumstance Penalty to the Check.

feats.title: Flip a Switch (1)
feats.description: When operating or riding a vehicle, you can flip a switch and give the vehicle one of the following effects:◆ Regain 5 SP◆ Increase Speed by 1This effect lasts until the end of the scene. A vehiclecan benefit from this only once per scene.

feats.title: On-The-Fly Repairs (1)
feats.description: Strain 3. When you Operate a device, you can also Repair it.

Abilities.title: Percussive Maintenance (1)
Abilities.description: _Requires Crafting_Strain 2. You give a device a good smack. It gains Working 3. While Working is active, it works normally even if it's Broken or has a Malfunction. In a vehicle, this usually refers to a single device, such as an engine or shields.The device then becomes immune to Percussive Maintenance until it is fixed.

feats.title: Know the Problem
feats.description: After using Percussive Maintenance on a Device, you also figure out the problem with it. You gain a +2 Circumstance Bonus to the next Crafting or Recall Knowledge Check targeting that device.

feats.title: Rugged Machinery
feats.description: After you Repair a device, it gains a Smack Token. While it has a Smack token, anyone can use Percussive Maintenanceon it and spend the token.

feats.title: Work Dammit!
feats.description: Strain +2.You can reapply Percussive Maintenance to a device that is immune to it. However, after Working ends, it breaks apart or is destroyed permanently.

Abilities.title: Prototypes
Abilities.description: _Requires Crafting_You can use Craft on two items to combine them into a Prototype item. While a character is wielding a Prototype item, they are effectively wielding both items.If an item is combined with Apparel, it no longer needs to be held in a hand to be used.Volatility: Prototype Items are volatile. If a user suffers a Critical Failure while using the item, roll a d6:◆ 1-2. Damage: The user takes 1d4 Fire or Electricity damage. Thetype depends on the type of item the protype is.◆ 3-4. Restart: The item becomes Unusable 1 as it needs to restartor cycle. While Unusable, it cannot be used.◆ 5-6. Noise: The prototype makes a loud noise.

feats.title: Magnum Prototype
feats.description: You carry an exceptional prototype item only you can make sense of. You can combine up to three items into the single item, but one of them has to be a different type (you can’t combine three weapons, for instance).Anyone but you who tries to use the item has a Detriment to all Checks while using it.

feats.title: Reliable Prototypes
feats.description: Whenever you roll for a Prototype’s volatility, roll a d12 instead. On 7-12, nothing happens.

feats.title: Prototype Weapon
feats.description: When you Craft a Prototype combining two weapons, you can also add an additional Energy Damage Type it deals.

Abilities.title: Risky Repairs (2)
Abilities.description: _Requires Crafting_Focus, Strain 3. You repair a device that is currently running, like a moving vehicle or an active circuit board. You must make a Repair Check, even if the device is only Damaged.◆ Failure: You take 2d6P1 Electric, Fire, or Blunt damage.

feats.title: Fast Hands
feats.description: You reduce the action cost of Risky Repairs to (1).

feats.title: Not-So-Risky Repairs
feats.description: Whenever you would gain a Critical Failure from Risky Repairs while using it on a Damaged (but not Broken) item, you only gain a Failure.

feats.title: Protective Gloves
feats.description: You wear protective gloves that aid you against failures. You gain Resistance 5 to the damage you would take from Risky Repairs.

Abilities.title: Weapon Mods
Abilities.description: _Requires Crafting_You can install various modifications on weapons using a Craft (E) action. Each weapon mayonly have one mod.You gain one of the following feats representing mods you can add to weapons.This Ability has four Feats.

feats.title: Explosive
feats.description: Explosive adds the Explosive (1m) Trait.The weapon gains Reload 2, unless it already has Reload or Magazine as a trait.

feats.title: Heat-Seeking
feats.description: Heat-seeking mod adds the Seeking Trait to the weapon.The heat-seeking weapon gains a -2 Circumstance Penalty to targeting opponents next to a heat source, such as an open flame.

feats.title: Lightning
feats.description: Lightning adds the Electric Damage type to the weapon and increases its Damage Die size by 1.The weapon gains the Blast quality.

feats.title: Rocket-Powered
feats.description: Rocket-Powered makes the weapon one weight class higherand increases its Damage Die size by 2.Huge weapons become Vehicle Weapons, and if the Damage Die would go beyond d12, it gains the Anti-Vehicle trait.The weapon is so massive that it lowers the wielder's Speed by 1.

Abilities.title: Hunter's Handbook
Abilities.description: You have acquired a large amount of lore about magical creatures and objects. You gain the Knowledge: Lore skill. This skill can be used to Recall Knowledge about all creatures and magical objects.

feats.title: Always Carry a Copy
feats.description: You can Draw (1) a copy of the physical Hunter’s Handbook to a Free Hand. As long as you hold it in your hand, you gain a +4 Circumstance Bonus to any Knowledge: Lore Checks.

feats.title: Encyclopedic Memory
feats.description: You have an encyclopedic memory of creatures. Whenever you Recall Knowledge and gain a Success or greater with Knowledge: Lore, you gain an additional question.

feats.title: Unerring Lore
feats.description: Whenever you would get a Critical Failure on a Knowledge: Lore Check, you upgrade it to a Failure, instead.

Abilities.title: Dogfighting
Abilities.description: _Requires a Vehicle Knowledge Skill_=You are used to close-quarters combat in vehicles. If another vehicle is chasing you and is within 2 Range Bands, you can move behind them with a Maneuver (1) action. You can choose whether you want to be Parallel or Behind 1.

feats.title: Barrel Roll (1)
feats.description: You quickly make a barrel roll with a flying vehicle. You Climb and Descend quickly, allowing the vehicle’s top and front weapons to be used against vehicles behind you.You can either lower the Distance to the closest target behind you by 1, or become Parallel to them.

feats.title: In My Sights (1)
feats.description: You use the vehicle’s movements to aim its weapons at a specific target. The next strike against the target with any of the vehicle’s weapons gains a +2 Circumstance Bonus.

feats.title: On Reverse (1)
feats.description: You spin the vehicle and move backwards. You cannot Speed Up, and after 3 rounds, you will start to Slow Down automatically. You are facing away from the direction of movement. You can return the vehicle to normal orientation with Maneuver (1).=

Abilities.title: Evasive Piloting
Abilities.description: _Requires a Vehicle Knowledge Skill_=You have learned to avoid damage while operating a vehicle.You can Evade (R) with a Vehicle, increasing the difficulty of the Attack by one difficulty rank.

feats.title: Glancing Blows
feats.description: Attacks against your unarmored vehicle never seem to be head-on.Vehicles you operate have Resistance 5 to damage from Ranged Attacks.

feats.title: Redirect Damage
feats.description: Strain 3. When you Evade with a vehicle, you can determine which part of the vehicle the attack hits if it causes a Malfunction.

feats.title: Smooth Landing
feats.description: You can use Landing (R) with a vehicle by making an Operate Check.

Abilities.title: Full Throttle (1)
Abilities.description: _Requires a Vehicle Knowledge Skill_Strain 5. You Speed Up twice.

feats.title: Explosive Boost (0)
feats.description: Strain 5. Whenever the vehicle takes damage from an explosion or another vehicle, youcan Speed Up, even if you are already at maximum speed.

feats.title: Secret Boost (1)
feats.description: Strain 5. You boost the vehicle beyond its normal speed. You Speed Up, even if the Vehicle is at maximum speed.You must spend 5 Strain each turn to maintain this speed.

feats.title: Speed Demon
feats.description: You recover 3 Strain each turn when in a Vehicle moving at maximum speed or beyond it.

Abilities.title: Manual Gunnery
Abilities.description: _Requires a Vehicle Knowledge Skill_=You have learned to use your front-facing Vehicle Weapons yourself, and cando so while piloting the Vehicle.

feats.title: All-Rounder
feats.description: You have rigged the vehicle so that you can use weapons pointing in any direction by yourself. You gain a -2 penalty on Strikes  with weapons other than front-facing weapons.

feats.title: Open a Way (1)
feats.description: Strain 3. You can shoot a full burst in front of you, aiming at a wall or other structure. Make a Break Check against it.On a Success, you make a hole large enough for the vehicle to fit through.

feats.title: Quick Reloader (1)
feats.description: You Reloada Vehicle Weapon for 2 actions’ worth.

Abilities.title: Ramming Speed
Abilities.description: _Requires a Vehicle Knowledge Skill_=You have learned to collide into vehicles without harming your own vehicle. Whenever you use the Collide action, make a Difficult (15) Operate Check.◆ Success: Your vehicle gains Resistance 15 to the damage.◇ Critical: Your vehicle gains Resistance 30 to the damage.◆ Failure: Your vehicle takes full damage.

feats.title: Going Through
feats.description: If you use Ramming Speed against a structure, you gain a Benefit on the Check to Break it.

feats.title: Pedestrian Killer
feats.description: If you use Ramming Speed to hit a character, you automatically Succeed on the RammingSpeed Check.

feats.title: PIT Maneuver (1)
feats.description: Instead of colliding head on, you can use the vehicle to gently push another Vehicle’s side, giving it Spin 1. When Spin counts down, the vehicle Slows Down.Spin can be reduced without slowing down with a successful Maneuver (1).

Abilities.title: Airstrike
Abilities.description: _Requires Knowledge: Warfare_You have prepared an airtstrike in advance. You gain anAir Support token. You may Call Airstrike (3) and spend the token to immediately and deploy a Warfare weapon you have access to to a location you know.You regain the Air Support token when you Plan Airstrike (H).You need to have a means of communicating the airstrike (such as a radio or smoke), and generally need to speak.

feats.title: Evac
feats.description: You may also Call Evac, calling in a vehicle to pick you up. You must either spend an Air Support token or have used the Air Support token during this Exploration Round to use Evac.

feats.title: Scout Call
feats.description: You may spend your Air Support token to Call Scout (3). When you do, Seek a 1 kilometer area from the air.

feats.title: Stealth Trigger
feats.description: You may Call Airstrike regardless of any conditions ; as  long  as  you  are  not Restrained. This is usually tied to a button or similar item on your possession.

Abilities.title: Commandeer Vehicle
Abilities.description: _Requires Knowledge: Warfare_You Operate a Vehicle with Knowledge: Warfare instead of a Vehicle Knowledge. You may only do this if you control a troop or have allies with you on the ship.

feats.title: Battle Stations
feats.description: You can use Vehicle Weapons with Knowledge: Warfare while you fulfill the requirements for Commandeer Vehicle.The Ally or Troop needs to spend (R) to use the Weapon to make a Strike.

feats.title: Composed Dodge (R)
feats.description: If a Critical Strike toward the vehicle you Commandeer would result in you being hit, you avoid it by a hair by moving only a little.

feats.title: Find More Power
feats.description: When you Command your Troop, you can instead increase the maximum speed of a Vehicleby 1 for 3 rounds.

Abilities.title: Rally the Troops
Abilities.description: Strain 5. You may retry a Battle Check.

feats.title: On the Frontline
feats.description: If you are in Conflict with your Troop, you can Rally the Troops with no Strain cost.

feats.title: Retreat
feats.description: Strain 3. When you would fail a Battle Check,you can instead choose to Retreat and avoid losing the size of your Troop.

feats.title: Take No Prisoners
feats.description: You command the Troop to act ruthlessly.They gain a +2 Circumstance Bonus to the Battle Check, but you gain no prisoners.

Abilities.title: Animal Companion
Abilities.description: You gain an Animal Companion, an animal ally that you can Command (1). It is a Mook, but it makes attacks using your Combat Proficiency if you Command it.It spends actions following its master or attacking any opponents near it as a Mook unless Commanded.You gain one of the Feats as the base type of your Animal Companion. When you take new Feats, you can choose to gain additional Animal Companions or add the abilities to a single one. You can only Command one Animal Companion at a time in Conflict.You can use a Train a Companion (H) Action to gain new Animal Companions of the types you have feats for.

feats.title: Fighter
feats.description: Fighters are animals that specialize in fighting. A Fighter is a Strong Mook with additional Hit Points equal to your Level. Its size is Small, Medium, or Large.

feats.title: Mount
feats.description: Mounts are animals meant for riding. A Mount is a Strong Mook that has the Mount feature, allowing you to use its Movement instead of your own when Commanding it. Its size must be at least one larger than yours.

feats.title: Scout
feats.description: Scouts are animals that specialize in seeking out threats and communicating them to you. A Scout is a Quick Mook that can Scout (E) an area ahead and tell you how dangerous it is (Low, Moderate, High). Scouts are Tiny or Small. Scouts can usually Fly or Burrow.

Abilities.title: Eidetic Memory
Abilities.description: You can Recall Knowledge on characters and objects you have perceived previously, even briefly.

feats.title: Eidetic Perception
feats.description: You remember details about people exactly. You can use the Call Bluff action on past conversations.

feats.title: Never Forget a Face
feats.description: Whenever you meet a character, you can ask the GW if you've met them before, andthey must answer you honestly. This feat ignores any disguises the character hadat the time.

feats.title: Reconstruct Image (E)
feats.description: You create a perfect visual rendition of anything you have seen previously, like an object, symbol, character, or scene.

Abilities.title: Kit Expert
Abilities.description: You carry more stuff on you than meets the eye. You gain a Kit Token, which you can spend to recover a Kit Charge. You alsotreat your Kit one Tier higher for Pack Slots. You regain the Kit Token with Shopping.

feats.title: Combined Kit
feats.description: Your Kit counts as two separate kinds of Kit (Basic, Covert, Crafting, Medical). You don’t need to pay extra for the second type of Kit.

feats.title: Impossible Fit (1)
feats.description: You use the Kit Token to Draw (1) a Heavy utility item of Rarity less than your Wealth.

feats.title: Kit Crafter
feats.description: When you Refresh, you also recover one Charge toyour Kit.

Abilities.title: Mind Palace
Abilities.description: When you Refresh, you can retreat into your own mental world. You retrace the events that have unfolded and may retake any SearchCheck you took in this time. You learn the locations of any new clues or secrets in the area, but not their nature.

feats.title: Conjecture
feats.description: You can fabricate plausible leads through nothing but conjecture. When you Search a location in your Mind Palace, you can reveal clues and secrets as if you actually found them. The open Check becomes Difficult (15), and gains the following result:◆ Critical Failure: You find a false clue in the mental space. The true nature of the clue is only revealed if the actual location is Searched again.

feats.title: Scan The Area (3)
feats.description: Focus. Youstudy your surrounding area, memorizing it in detail. Later on, you can use Mind Palace on the location as ifyou had Searched it.

feats.title: Visualize
feats.description: You visualize a location through a map, model, or similar representation of it. You can Search through the area with Mind Palace. You can also use this to find blind spots and security measures.

Abilities.title: Notice A Detail (1)
Abilities.description: Strain 2. You focus on a detail. Choose a character, object, or environmental detail you can see or hear about. You gain a +2 Circumstance Bonus to the next Perception Check on the target. You also immediately notice if there is something off or unusual about the target.

feats.title: Deep Analysis
feats.description: Strain +1.You can also ask one question about the target.

feats.title: Lingering Feeling
feats.description: When you Refresh, you can ask the GW whether you missed out on a clue or secret in a specified area or character.

feats.title: Red Herring
feats.description: When you choose a detail, if the GW tells you there is nothing unusual about the target, you can retract your benefit and regain the 2 Strain Points (SP).

Abilities.title: Pack Expert
Abilities.description: Your Scrounge actions are reduced to (2), and you can pull out multiple items when you do.

feats.title: Deep Pockets
feats.description: Your Scrounge actions are reduced to (1). Items in your Pack count as if they were in your Pockets for Actions and Abilities.

feats.title: Quick Draw (0)
feats.description: Strain 1. You Draw an item from your Pockets or your Pack.

feats.title: Unburdened
feats.description: Heavy Kitsor items in your Pack do not affect your Mobility Skill.

Abilities.title: Stratagem
Abilities.description: Focus. Youcome up with a plan on the fly. When you Focus, designate a character or object and roll a d20. The first time you interact with the target this turn in a way that requires a Check, use the d20 result you rolled for the Stratagem instead of rolling a d20 for the Check.

feats.title: Contingency Plan
feats.description: Strain +2. Reroll the d20 and choose either of the dice as your Stratagem's result.

feats.title: Defensive Stratagem (R)
feats.description: If the target of your Stratagem tries to target you with an Attack , you can replace their Attack'sroll with the Stratagem's result.

feats.title: Shared Stratagem (R)
feats.description: When an ally interacts with the target of your Stratagem, you can grant that ally the d20 result instead.

Abilities.title: Tough as Nails
Abilities.description: You gain an additional +2 Hit Points per rank in Toughness.

feats.title: Back To The Fight
feats.description: When you Get Up (0), you gain 10 Temporary Hit Points.

feats.title: Not Today(R)
feats.description: When a character tries to Kill you, they have to succeed in a Difficult (15) Check VS your Toughness.

feats.title: Unmovable
feats.description: When you use Resist (R), you gain a +2 Circumstance Bonus to your Toughness against the effect.

Abilities.title: Unwavering Will
Abilities.description: You gain an additional +2 Strain Points per rank in Resolve.

feats.title: Nope (R)
feats.description: Strain 10. You completely ignore an effect that targets your Resolve.

feats.title: Retain Focus (R)
feats.description: Strain 2. When you would lose Focus due to taking damage, you don’t lose Focus .

feats.title: Tenacity (R)
feats.description: Strain 5. You don’t get Defeated at 0 Hit Points. You gain an Injury, and take any damage to your Strain Points instead. You can still die to Massive Damage.

Abilities.title: Alchemical Body
Abilities.description: Your body has been treated with alchemical agents, probably by accident. Choose an Alchemical Item. You are permanently under the effects of that item if it lasts until Refresh or Rest.If the item doesn’t last until Refresh or Rest, you instead gain its effects each time you Refresh, and you can cause its effect to a target within 3m of you with Expel (2). The Expel Action then becomes Discharged until you Refresh.

feats.title: Improved Body
feats.description: You gain the Improvement effect of the first Alchemical Item you chose.

feats.title: Second Treating
feats.description: Gain the base effects of another Alchemical Item.

feats.title: Self-Immunity
feats.description: You are immune to any deleterious effects of the Alchemical Item you chose.

Abilities.title: Chemical Immunity
Abilities.description: You become immune to alchemical poisons.You gain Resistance 5 to Toxic Damage.

feats.title: Acid Resistance
feats.description: You gain Resistance 5 to Acid Damage.

feats.title: Poison Immunity
feats.description: You become immune to Toxic Damage, and all poisons and drugs.

feats.title: Recognizeby Taste
feats.description: You can taste poisons to determine what they are made of. You automatically succeed on a Recall Knowledge Check to do so.

Abilities.title: Metal Skin
Abilities.description: You gain a +2 Universal Bonus to Resistance against Physical Damage, on top of your armor.

feats.title: Heat-Resistant
feats.description: Apply the Universal Bonus to Resistance to Fire Damage.

feats.title: Resistivity
feats.description: Apply the Universal Bonus to Resistance to Electricity Damage.

feats.title: Shock Absorber
feats.description: You have a built-in shock-absorber. You gain Resistance 20 to Falling Damage, and increase the Universal Bonus against Blunt Damage to +4.

Abilities.title: Overdriver
Abilities.description: Whenever you use an Overdrive effect ona Bionic, it becomes Charged 2. While Charged, its Item Bonus is doubled.

feats.title: Efficient Overdriver
feats.description: Reduce the cost of Overdrive effects by 1.

feats.title: Lasting Charge
feats.description: Bionics become Charged 4 instead.

feats.title: Maximum Overdrive (0)
feats.description: Strain 10. You put everything at risk. You gain a Benefit to a Mobility or Combat Check. You Charge all Bionics you have.

Abilities.title: Gift
Abilities.description: You gain a gift from a deity or other entity (such as a demon or other outsider). This is often in the form of an item, tattoo, or some similar token or symbol.You also gain a Covenant, such as a promise or servitude in years. If you break the Covenant, you become Exhausted until you make amends to the entity.Discuss the nature of this gift and covenant with your GW. Usually it grants you some Special Ability similar to an Adversary.

feats.title: Gift of Magic
feats.description: You gain a Magic Ability of your choice. You can gain Feats from it as normal.

feats.title: Gift of Resilience
feats.description: You gain +5 Maximum SP. You gain Resistance 5 to a damage type of your choice.

feats.title: Gift of Youth
feats.description: You gain +5 Maximum HP. You cannot die of old age, and you physically retain your desired age.You may become older if your character is younger than their desired age.

Abilities.title: Mutation
Abilities.description: You become physically mutated, gaining supernatural features. Choose one of the feats described. This Ability has 4 Feats.

feats.title: Blood
feats.description: Your blood and skin becomes a different hue (such as blue or purple). Choose one:◆ Healing: Your blood heals 1d6P1 Hit Points (HP) to a character on contact. You must take at least 1 damage to provide this benefit. You cannot heal yourself this way.◆ Harming: Your blood deals 1d6P1 Holy or Dark damage to a character that deals damage to you with a Melee Strike or who is spattered with it.

feats.title: Crown
feats.description: You gain a supernatural feature on your head. Choose one:◆ Halo: You gain a divine halo that appears above or behind your head. You can hide it when necessary. It is a Light Source (4 meters). You gaina +2 Status Bonus to Diplomacy while your Halo is visible.◆ Horns: You gain horns or antlers. You gain a permanent +2 Status Bonus to Intimidation.

feats.title: Eyes
feats.description: Your eyes glow and you can see many things clearer. You gain a +2 Status Bonus to Perception and gain Darkvision.

feats.title: Wings
feats.description: You sprout wings. You gain a Fly Speed of 3m.Your wings can be targeted with Called Shot (0), removing your Fly Speed until you Refresh.

Abilities.title: Darksight
Abilities.description: You don’t gain the Penalty to Checks from Dim Lighting.

feats.title: Cat’s Eye
feats.description: The radius of Dim Lighting around a Light Source increases from 1 meter to 3m.

feats.title: Darkvision (1)
feats.description: Strain 2. You gain Darkvision 3. You have Darkvision for the Duration.

feats.title: Magic Sensitivity
feats.description: You can see magical energies. When you Search or Seek, you can also determine whether magic has been used recently.

Abilities.title: Intangible
Abilities.description: You are intangible, like a ghost or spirit. You cannot touch anything outside of your equipment and items in your inventory. You can walk through walls.You gain the Undead Adversary Trait, and are immune to Physical Damage. Physical Damage you deal is instead Cold or Dark Damage.

feats.title: Ghost Flight
feats.description: You gain a FlySpeed of 3m.

feats.title: Invisibility (1)
feats.description: Strain 3. You gain Invisibility 3. While invisible, you do not trigger Vision and any Checks to Seek you have a Detriment.

feats.title: Possession (2)
feats.description: You possess a character or an object. If it is a character, you can Command them. Make a Difficult (15) Check VS Resolve. On a Success, they must follow your Command.If you possess an object, unless it is able to move normally (such as a suit of armor or a vehicle), you are Slowed and halve your Speed. Your actions can be otherwise limited by the object you possess.You possess the target until you either Leave (1) or are Exorcised out of it.

Abilities.title: Regeneration
Abilities.description: Your body automatically regenerates. At the beginning of each round, you Regain 1 Hit Point(HP).However, if you fall to 0 Hit Points, you cannot get up without using Get Up (0) until you return back to Full Hit Points.Your regeneration can be stopped by burning you or staking you through the heart.

feats.title: Fast Regeneration
feats.description: You regenerate 3 HP per Round instead.

feats.title: Focus Regeneration (1)
feats.description: Focus, Strain 6. You quickly regenerate your wounds. You regain 10 Hit Points.

feats.title: Injury Regeneration
feats.description: You can regenerate through injuries. You can Regenerate (E). When you do, you automatically Recuperate from an Injury.If you Regenerate (H) instead. you can remove a Grievous Injury.

Abilities.title: Shapeshift (3)
Abilities.description: Focus. You shapeshift into a creature. When you choose this Ability, choose a creature. You always Shapeshift into this creature. You cannot mimic specific visual aspects.Choose up to two of the following Adversary Traits: Tiny, Small, Medium, Large, Fast, Ability, Aquatic, Climbing, Mount, Resistance, Sense, Skilled. You gain these Adversary Traits while Shapeshifted.=If you choose Skilled, you become Trained (+2) in the Skill if you are Untrained. Otherwise, you gain a +2 Status Bonus to it. You cannot equip Apparel or Weapons while Shapeshifted unless they are specifically made for this form. You stay Shapeshifted until you Return (3) to your normal form or become Unconscious or Dead.

feats.title: Adaptable Form
feats.description: You may choose a different creature and Adversary Traits each time you use Shapeshift.

feats.title: Advanced Trait
feats.description: You gain a third Adversary Trait, and it may be one of the following: Armored, Huge, Flying, Immunity, Strong, Swift. You may adjustyour existing Traits to compensate (such as changing Large to Huge and replacing Large with another Trait).You also can equip a single tool, weapon, or item while shapeshifted and use it normally, such as by using your mouth.

feats.title: Hybrid Form
feats.description: You may choose to turn into a Hybrid Form, a bipedal cross between you and the creature, thatcan use your equipment normally, as long as your size doesn’t change.

Abilities.title: Undead
Abilities.description: You gain the Undead Adversary Trait.You don’t need to breathe or eat.

feats.title: Bound in Death
feats.description: You gain a +2 Universal Bonus to all Checks toward one character until they die.This can be a hostile or friendly binding.

feats.title: Headless
feats.description: You gain the ability to sense life within 10 meters of your body. Your head can be removed and and you see through it regardless of distance to your body.Your body can act independently of the head, but is effectively Blinded without the head.

feats.title: Lichdom
feats.description: You gain a soul cage, an item that is Extreme (25) Difficulty to Break. If you die, your undead body is regenerated from the soul cage, if it is not Broken.

Abilities.title: Vampirism
Abilities.description: You have contracted the curse of vampirism. You gain the Undead Adversary Trait, and if you are exposed to the sun, you become Sunstruck as long as you stay in the sunlight. When Sunstruck, you have a -2 Penalty to all Checks and take 1d10P1 Fire Damage at the beginning of each turn.When you KnockOut or Kill a character, you may also drink their blood. If you do, you gain 5 Temporary Hit Points.

feats.title: Brutal Feast (1)
feats.description: You eat a character alive. Kill the character and gain 5 HP and Temporary HP.You also obviously brutalize the body, making it clear they were eaten alive.

feats.title: Daywalker
feats.description: You have gained resistance to sunlight. You no longer take damage while Sunstruck.Additionally, even light shade is enough to avoid the effects of Sunstruck, such as heavy clothing or a parasol.

feats.title: Vampiric Strength
feats.description: You gain a +2 Universal Bonus to Force and Mobility Checks and Melee Strike Damage.You lose these bonuses while Sunstruck.

Abilities.title: Evolution
Abilities.description: You gain a Superpower, a Style, and a Weakness.You can take this Ability multiple times for different Superpowers.

feats.title: Advanced Style
feats.description: You modify a Style you have, combining it with a Second Style or altering it further.

feats.title: New Evolution
feats.description: You gain a new Superpower using the Style you have.

feats.title: Second Style
feats.description: You gain a second Style to use for this Superpower.

Abilities.title: Stand (0)
Abilities.description: You manifest an invisible spirit that can take Actions in your stead within 3 meters of you. Its location is relative to yours. Abilities you gain are split between you and the spirit, but you share statisticsand Conditions.

feats.title: Independence
feats.description: Strain 3. Your spirit’s range is 20 meters, and you can sense through it.

feats.title: Split Manifestation
feats.description: Your spirit can split into up to 10 Tiny Spirits, but they all share Action Points with you.

feats.title: Superior Range
feats.description: The range of the spirit becomes 10 meters from you, or 1 kilometer with Independence.

Abilities.title: Super Gear
Abilities.description: You have a piece of equipment that enhances yourself. Choose a Path or a Defense. The equipment grants a +1 Item Bonus to it.

feats.title: Advanced Gear
feats.description: Increase the item bonus you gain to +2.

feats.title: Power Gear
feats.description: You have a piece of gear that provides you with a superpower-like ability. You gain a Superpower that has the Limit of being usable only when this piece of tech is working. You gain an Item Bonus instead of Universal Bonus. Cannot be used to stack with the same Superpower.You can take this Feat additional times, and each time, you gain a new piece of equipment.

feats.title: Super Vehicle
feats.description: You gain a powerful vehicle with Rarity 8 that has one of these elements:◆ All-Terrain: It can fly, drive, and dive.◆ Gadgetry: It has five additional Customization Slots.◆ Independent: The vehicle can act independently. You can Command it.

Abilities.title: Transformation Sequence (1)
Abilities.description: You transform, gaining a new piece of Apparel and a Weapon(s) which you equip. When taking this ability, decide the form you take and anynew pieces of Apparel and Weapon(s) you gain. Their maximum combined Rarity is 10 + your Level. You may add new Traits to your summoned Apparel and Weapon(s) as you level up or improve their Attributes (like Damage Die or Armor).You cannot choose the Advanced Trait for the items gained from Transformation Sequence.You gain a +3 Universal Bonus to Checks for the duration of the current Round.

feats.title: Advanced Transformation
feats.description: Your equipment is enhanced. Increase the Maximum Rarity of the items you gain to 15 + your level.

feats.title: Cut Short(0)
feats.description: Strain 2. You transform in the blink of an eye. This may be done as a Reaction when you would receive damage.

feats.title: Special Power
feats.description: You gain a Superpower. You gain access to it with Transformation Sequence. This overrides its Weakness.

feats.title: Using in a Campaign
feats.description: Transformation Sequence is best used as a Free Ability gained by all characters in the specific game. This can represent the characters being a group of magical girls, sentai heroes, etc.Transformation Sequence also eschews any need for the Wealth system, at least when thinking of combat equipment.
